programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar

programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence

programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Movie: Liar Liar
programme.desc: After missing his son's fifth birthday, a successful, dishonest lawyer wakes up the next day with the curse of only being able to speak the truth.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Worst Days Ever
programme.desc: Watch a baby from hell prank people on the street and see what happens when a farmer becomes a human hay bale.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Ridiculous Moments
programme.desc: Watch a surprise objection at a wedding ceremony and see why jumping off buildings should be left to the pros.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Hilarious Antics
programme.desc: Reporters mistake their microphones for food, an intense gamer flips out in more ways than one and find out the top six signs it’s time to break up.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Silly Surprises
programme.desc: Watch what happens when two guys pull $10,000 out of people's hair.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Popcorn Pants
programme.desc: Michael delivers a shock at a shipping store when wine tips over and gets bubble wrap tipsy. Then, at a popcorn shop, he dons the latest kernel fashions, and at a theater he stuns his helper with a trick that jumps off the screen.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Fit For The Fastlane
programme.desc: Terry prepares to announce at a NASCAR race, which will be his first public appearance since the pandemic started. Wanting to look his best, he tries getting back into shape while trying to convince Rachel to sing at the speedway.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Oui Oui Terr-y
programme.desc: Tammy grows suspicious of Terry’s romantic anniversary surprise trip to Paris. Meanwhile, Zurie joins in on the Bradshaw family tradition and finds her passion for showing horses.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Top Chef
programme.desc: Terry and Tammy attempt one last time to try and convince Lacey and Noah to move to Texas by offering to buy them a restaurant. Meanwhile, Rachel introduces her new guy to the family by pulling a major prank on Terry.

programme.desc: Join Terry Bradshaw and his family as they navigate life.

programme.desc: Terry’s eldest daughter Rachel’s new real estate career needs help, Lacey’s husband doesn’t want to move to Texas and Erin has been keeping a secret from him about a recent change to her appearance.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Terry Is in a Jam
programme.desc: The Bradshaw clan travels to Dallas as Terry is hosting (and driving in) the big Monster Jam truck rally. When Terry suffers from a panic attack, an old sibling rivalry is forced to come to a head.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Rachel is with the wrong guy and everyone in the family can see it but her. While Terry and Zurie get payback on Tammy after years of her pranks, Lacey and Noah consider moving back to Texas to be closer to family.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Terry is invited to Washington D.C. to sing with Rob Gronkowski at the USO. While he brings his family along to meet the troops, Rachel gets her mojo back and falls for a marine.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Quarantine Crazy
programme.desc: As the Coronavirus pandemic grips the nation, Terry invites the family to hunker down with him at the ranch, driving everyone crazy.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Man Problems
programme.desc: Terry and the girls get involved in Rachel’s love life, resulting in a competition to find her Mr. Right. The family tries to talk Terry out of agreeing to be a potential spokesperson for a certain product.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Classic Cars and Vintage Eggs
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney force Khloe to take a sentimental sister trip to Palm Springs to relive some of their fondest childhood memories from a much simpler time. Meanwhile, Rob meets with a life coach and Kris receives a proposition from a royal family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Sister Surrogacy
programme.desc: Khloé explores the possibility of becoming Kim's surrogate, but receives some shocking news about her own fertility in the process. Meanwhile, the sisters pressure Kourtney to step her flirting game up, and Rob threatens to bail on his 30th birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Beginnings and Endings
programme.desc: Khloe and Tristan run into some roadblocks in the process of expanding their family, Scott faces some big decisions about his relationship, and Kim prepares for a test that will determine her future as a lawyer.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Comment
programme.desc: When Scott accidentally causes some speculation that Khloe and Tristan are back together, Khloe is overwhelmed by the backlash online. The family worries that Kim is going through a difficult time and tries to cheer her up. Kendall has baby fever.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Winners Take All
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe think old flames are brewing between Kourtney and Scott and take it upon themselves to set them up on a romantic date. The Kardashian girls challenge the Jenners to an obstacle course. Kris and Corey agree to abstain from sex.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: New Friends and The Bunker
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are curious about Kourtney's new friend, Addison Rae. Scared by the state of the world, Kim takes measures to prepare for the future, while Kris is afraid to let her mom celebrate her birthday during a pandemic.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Kiss
programme.desc: Gloria decides to cook more traditional Colombian meals, which is met with some ribbing from Jay. Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mom when she learns that Alex likes a boy.

programme.title: Modern Family: Strangers on a Treadmill
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchell help each other spare their significant others from embarrassment. Jay goes to a Quinceañera to prove a point to Gloria, and Haley gives sisterly advice to Alex.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly Up
programme.desc: A Chicago brewhouse serves up beer to go with mussels, a brisket sandwich and headcheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soup-Centric
programme.desc: Guy is filling up on some soup. In Baltimore, the authentic Irish pub is serving seafood gumbo and a twist on traditional corned beef and cabbage.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: The sun is out and the surf is high as Guy Fieri hits up some ultimate DDD spots by the shore. First, he's in Honolulu to say 'Hi' to an old buddy who's reelin' in fresh poke and smokin' pork by the plateful.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Aces of Authenticity
programme.desc: Guy hits up some joints that are authentic to the bone. In Santa Fe, N.M., a farm-raised Chimayan owner turns out traditional dishes like blue corn enchiladas with red chilli sauce.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island and Desert
programme.desc: Guy finds a desert treasure and island flavour. In Palm Desert, California, he visits a breakfast-lunch cafe dishin' out a righteous rib melt and nostalgic breakfast tarts. Then, in Maui, Hawaii, a funky gluten-free spot makes full-flavoured pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Oldies but Goodies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some legit local landmarks. In Des Moines, a historic drive-in is famous for its nearly century-old chili recipe. In Leeds Point, N.J., a scenic seaside joint has served up fresh catch since the '30s.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cultural Twist
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into cultural cuisine with a twist! First, there's a cafe that's been serving scratch-made Scandinavian specialties in Salt Lake City since the 1950s. Next, there's a pizza joint putting an Indian spin on the classic Italian pie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smoked, Grilled And Fried
programme.desc: Guy's diggin' into all kinds of meat: out of the smoker, on the grill and into the fryer.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Comin' from All Over the Map
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri are cooking up recipes sent by Triple-D alums who join them via video chat. On this menu, there's gangster gorditas comin' from Phoenix, Korean chicken wings out of Denver and a steak specialty from a Jewish deli in Houston, TX.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pierogis, Pork and Pizza
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diving into all kinds of off-the-hook flavors on this trip. In Hollywood, Fla., a sandwich shop servin' up a terrific taste of Peru. A pierogi palace in Philadelphia giving a fresh take on Polish specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creole, Cold Cuts and Crepes
programme.desc: Guy's cookin' up everything from creole to cold cuts to crazy Asian crepes. First, a multi-generational joint bringing New Orleans to Los Angeles with off-the-hook gumbo and etouffee.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Succulent Sandwiches
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into succulent sandwiches! In Oakland, a real-deal butchery stacking up killer cheesesteak and off-the-chain chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Racing Through Charlotte
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out high octane joints in Charlotte, North Carolina, with NASCAR driver Clint Bowyer. First, the relocated Triple-D alum dishin' out dynamite burgers and a unique spin on shrimp.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Spicy to Icy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's heating up with some spice and cooling off with some ice. In Palm Springs, Calif., a barbecue joint pilin' up the meats and firin' up their 'flamethrower.'

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Store-Bought is Fine
programme.desc: Store-bought ingredients pass the test for Ina Garten as she makes sweets, treats and more. Ready-made shortcuts wow in her raspberry baked Alaska with fresh raspberry sauce and she takes turkey sandwiches to the next level.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Liquor Store Secrets
programme.desc: Ina's unlocking her liquor store secrets and easy techniques that take red wine-braised short ribs, fennel soup gratin and an awesome fresh apple spice cake to the next level.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Herbalicious Dishes
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts demonstrate how to elevate any recipe with the fresh herbs of spring, starting with Geoffrey Zakarian's farfalle with fresh herbs and goat cheese. Then, it's time to put trends to the test, including DIY dried herbs in the microwave.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Hidden Talent Party
programme.desc: Giada hosts a cocktail party and good old-fashioned talent show with her friends in the style of a creative salon. Guests bring their best creative hidden talents, whether it's singing, playing the guitar, magic or juggling.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Taste The World Party
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis invites friends over to sample healthy versions of dishes from around the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Pizza the Action
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is on the ranch cooking up some creative new pizzas. She shakes things up with a butternut squash crust pizza, makes a pizza dough bowl filled with a fabulous salad and thinks sweet with a brownie pizza.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 4 Super-Fast Suppers
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has the lowdown on super-fast suppers, including spicy chorizo burgers with shortcut taco tots, her favourite fried calamari flatbread and a stunning stir-fried quick veggie pad Thai.

programme.title: The Kitchen: The Kitchen's Essentials
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are sharing essential dishes and pro tips for every home cook. Recipes include classic shrimp scampi and chocolate croissant bread pudding. Plus, Chef Cliff Crooks stops by to help the hosts tackle some common cooking do's and don'ts.

programme.title: Magnolia Table with Joanna Gaines: Brunch
programme.desc: Joanna cooks up sweet and savory brunch staples like kale and bacon hash brown casserole, French toast crunch, garlic cheese grits and a blended peach sunrise.

programme.title: Zoe Bakes: Porch Party Pies
programme.desc: Zod Frantois bakes up a table full of irresistible pies and cooks up one of her favorite desserts to share with friends and family on her porch as they kick off their annual tradition of welcoming spring back to Minnesota.

programme.title: Magnolia Table with Joanna Gaines: Homemade Comfort Food
programme.desc: Joanna shares dishes that became Gaines family comfort food during a busy season, a delicious parmesan chicken and fettuccine alfredo. In this episode, Joanna pairs it with a layered arugula salad and tiramisu for dessert.

programme.title: Ranch to Table: Welcome to the Ranch
programme.desc: Elizabeth Poett welcomes us to her family's 14,000-acre ranch in California. Working side by side with her husband, Austin, she tends to the land beginning at dawn. For dinner, she prepares a Santa Maria Style Tri-Tip and a Blackberry-Apple Galette.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Best of the West
programme.desc: From a taste of the Rocky Mountains to southwestern specialties, he's takin' in the flavor of the region at all kinds of righteous joints.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom and Dad
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hanging out at real-deal mom-and-pop spots. In Logan, Utah, a family-run Indian joint hooked up to a gas station with Dad dishin' out specialties from his homeland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: British, Hawaiian and Mexican
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub from all around the globe! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a true British pub serving authentic English staples from fish and chips to Yorkshire pudding.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Carnivore Delivery
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri are cooking up recipes sent by DDD alums who join in the fun via video chat. On this menu, there are monster beef ribs from Las Vegas, a waffle-hamburger mashup from Atlanta and pizza and wings from San Antonio.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Ordering All Kinds of Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cooks takeout with four DDD alums via video chat. There's real deal Italian from Scottsdale, AZ, American Indian fare from Denver, gourmet grub out of a Massachusetts lounge and short ribs all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Tanked!: Country Superstar Surprise!
programme.desc: Brittany Kerr, wife of country superstar Jason Aldean, wants Wayde and Brett to surprise her husband with a fish tank. The great outdoors themed tank has to be a total secret and built before Jason returns from his tour.

programme.title: Tanked!: Shark Tank in the Shark Tank
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett are designing a tank for the San Jose Sharks hockey team! With replica hockey gear, the San Jose Sharks logo and of course sharks!

programme.title: Tanked!: All in the Ocean
programme.desc: Atlantic City is in for a 'fish lift.' Ocean Casino Resort wants to bring the ocean into 'Ocean.' The 6,000-gallon aquarium has ATM team literally burning through panels to get this job done.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Tracy Morgan: Shark vs. Octopus
programme.desc: ATM makes Tracy Morgan's tank dreams a reality when they transform his pool house into a shark oasis. As winter lurks, Tracy is still waiting and ATM must race to finish a new home for his beloved sharks.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tanked in Sonoma
programme.desc: ATM has been so busy they could use a glass of wine! Good thing their next tank is on a vineyard. CEO of Jordan Winery wants a beautiful reef tank to live on his winery.

programme.title: Tanked!: Shaq-a-Tank!
programme.desc: ATM gets a surprise call from their favorite customer, Shaquille O'Neal. The Retired NBA Super Star loves his first tank and is back for a second! Incorporating his love of Hookah and an Egyptian theme the guys build a tank fit for a Pharaoh.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Tracy Morgan: Shark vs. Octopus
programme.desc: ATM makes Tracy Morgan's tank dreams a reality when they transform his pool house into a shark oasis. As winter lurks, Tracy is still waiting and ATM must race to finish a new home for his beloved sharks.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tanked in Sonoma
programme.desc: ATM has been so busy they could use a glass of wine! Good thing their next tank is on a vineyard. CEO of Jordan Winery wants a beautiful reef tank to live on his winery.

programme.title: Tanked!: Shaq-a-Tank!
programme.desc: ATM gets a surprise call from their favorite customer, Shaquille O'Neal. The Retired NBA Super Star loves his first tank and is back for a second! Incorporating his love of Hookah and an Egyptian theme the guys build a tank fit for a Pharaoh.

programme.title: Tanked!: Real Aquariums of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Erika Girardi from the hit TV show, The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills needs a tank. Also known as Erika Jayne, this Diva knows exactly what she wants and that's an octopus!

programme.title: Tanked!: Country Superstar Surprise!
programme.desc: Brittany Kerr, wife of country superstar Jason Aldean, wants Wayde and Brett to surprise her husband with a fish tank. The great outdoors themed tank has to be a total secret and built before Jason returns from his tour.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Momma's Surprise
programme.desc: A sea lion called Finn has tummy trouble and the team feeds him a snack that will help them investigate why. Big Mama the guitarfish may be living up to her name, and the boa-duo Ripley and Ridley receive a new home.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Maggie the Magnificent
programme.desc: Technology from California is brought to the aquarium to monitor beluga whale activity. Maggie the Asian small-clawed otter's training kicks in when receiving a shot, and Morty the sea star undergoes a checkup after suspicious growths form.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Four Chicks and Counting
programme.desc: The African penguin colony welcome their newest additions after a successful mating season. Sea otter Mara is introduced to the rest of the raft, and the wild bottlenose dolphin population in Florida is examined.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: A Deer Family Welcome
programme.desc: On Chimpanzee Island, a new generation of males emerge, jeopardizing chimp Dylan's 15-year reign. Then, it's survival of the fittest for Indian mudskipper fish Danny versus alpha male Arnie, while deer Serena and Odin welcome their second doe.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Wishing for a Meerkat Miracle
programme.desc: At the zoo, a recent fire is suspected to be what's keeping Chester's hornbills from having chicks and a meerkat called Huskie has baby blues. Meanwhile, a sun bear called Millie has a feisty cub on her paws.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Bermuda Skink Shuffle
programme.desc: Docile rock hyraxes Daissie and Nungu are expecting their eighth litter. Meanwhile, over at the reptile house, the Bermuda skinks Poptart and Sharkface meet for the first time and promptly start their rather aggressive mating dance.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Protecting 007
programme.desc: Keepers are curious when Margery the Malayan tapir is suddenly eating for two. Meanwhile, when a deadly virus is suspected of being the cause behind a female hyacinth macaw's untimely death, her partner James Bond must undergo tests and total isolation.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The New Otter Brood

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Habitat Fit for a King
programme.desc: Problems arise when transferring Asiatic lion king Iblis and his kin to a new habitat. When a blood bath ensues in the vampire crab exhibit, keepers must find the culprit, and friendly Andean bear Bernie suffers from a broken heart and a tooth ache.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Bongo Love Story
programme.desc: Trouble ensues when the time comes to pair Chester's newest bongo couple, Safi and Moti. A trio of silver-eared mesia chicks must find a way to survive when a fierce storm destroys their nest, and Gentle George the Malagasy giant rat faces surgery.

programme.title: The Zoo: Higher Purpose
programme.desc: Two adorable tiger cubs have outgrown their keepers and need to move to the adult exhibit. A silverback gorilla receives pioneering treatment to curb his worsening eyesight. And a passionate keeper plays matchmaker to a peculiar pair of birds.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: My Big Fat Lottery Property
programme.desc: Wendy has always put the needs of her two sons before her own, but now that she's won $200,000 a year for life on a Florida scratcher, she can finally treat herself to a dream home. She wants to move back to Lake City, Florida to be close to family.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: California Dreaming
programme.desc: After winning $180 million, Rick and Lorie look for their dream home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Waterfront Windfall

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home International: Who Wants to Buy a Dream Home
programme.desc: Everyone wants to be a millionaire, but not everyone is game enough to go on national television to win it. Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen takes a game-show winner and his fiancée on a tour of future family homes with room for her "boudoir" and his "dudoir."

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home International: A Dose of Luck

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Scratch Offs: G'ma's Pad
programme.desc: With 37 piercings, 89 tattoos and endless wigs, David Bromstad has never met a winner like this grandma! She wants a big house so her elderly mother can move in with a yard to fill with grandkids, and David has a $200,000 budget to find her perfect home.

programme.desc: After things get heated with the seller of his Hollywood Hills compound, Altman finds himself working under new perimeters and impossible deadline. James and David go above and beyond to get a listing of a home in the Flats of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Send It to Viral
programme.desc: Shamed by the crazy drama that broke out at their Beverly Hills brokers' open, James and David try to salvage their relationship with the sellers and finally get them an offer. Tracy attempts the impossible by finding her ultra-picky friend a home.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Pony Up
programme.desc: In an attempt to sell her historic Del Mar listing, Tracy and team head to the racetrack in search of wealthy buyers. Altman faces a tough negotiator (his wife Heather) when trying to sell a problematic listing in the Bird Streets.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Failure to Launch

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Brother Dearest
programme.desc: When David's brother Michael puts James and David to the task of finding him a development opportunity, they are led to the famed house where the movie 'Mommie Dearest' was filmed. Flagg battles his control issues when he teams up with Bobby.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Hell or High Water

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Naked in the Backyard

programme.desc: It was a mystery that stumped investigators for years. A college student disappeared after a night out clubbing. Her mother thought she was at a sleepover with friends and it took an eagle-eyed detective to find the truth buried in a pile of lies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared
programme.desc: A former homecoming queen taking her first steps into adult life is brutally murdered. Who would want to harm her? The investigation centered on two men and a mysterious black bag that seemed to come out of nowhere.

programme.title: Exhumed: Written in Blood/ Killer Cowboy
programme.desc: A typical summer morning for four-year-old Heidi Jones turned into a nightmare when she found her mother dead in the living room. Law enforcement work feverishly to solve the murder of Loretta Jones. An exhumation is the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Snapped: Janice Bonnell
programme.desc: Sleepy Seadrift Texas is unnerved by the death of a local landscaper after evidence at the scene of an apparent hit-and-run points to a deceptive killer with a dangerous past.

programme.title: Snapped: Annette Cahill
programme.desc: The deadly beating of a young man in West Liberty, Iowa sits unsolved for twenty-five years, until cold case detectives are approached by an unexpected witness. Their renewed search leads them to the unlikeliest of killers.

programme.title: Snapped: Kayla Nelson
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a devoted father leads Arkansas police to a shocking crime scene, the search for answers reveals gang threats, and a killer that's willing to go to great lengths to escape justice.

programme.title: Dateline: Return to the Early Shift
programme.desc: When a Kentucky man is convicted of murdering his co-worker, it appears the mystery is solved until a stunning disclosure years later turns the closed case upside-down.

programme.title: Dateline: Prairie Confidential
programme.desc: A murder case considered closed by North Dakota detectives is suddenly reopened when a confidential informant comes forward with a tip about an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Killing Versace: The Hunt for a Serial Killer
programme.desc: The headline grabbing murder of fashion icon Gianni Versace sent detectives into a tireless chase for a serial killer. Now expert insights on the mind of Andrew Cunanan, and a deep dive by forensic and legal specialists.

programme.title: Golden State Killer: Main Suspect
programme.desc: After a decades long crime spree terrorizing California, a DNA breakthrough has led detectives to a suspect in one of the most famous cases in history. Stephanie Gosk, and detective Paul Holes, trace the life of suspect, Joe DeAngelo.

programme.title: Kemper on Kemper: Inside The Mind of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Ed Kemper, also known as the Co-Ed Killer, murdered and dismembered 10 people, including his own mother. Former FBI agent John Douglas takes us through his extensive interviews with Kemper, which became the backbone of modern criminal psychology.

programme.title: In Defense Of: Ted Bundy
programme.desc: Sought out by serial killer, Ted Bundy, in the 1970s, Criminal Defense Attorney, John Henry Browne delves into his personal and professional journey to defend one of the most notorious killers in history.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer: The Green River Killer
programme.desc: Over 20 years four-dozen women are murdered in Washington State, many of them prostitutes, and five of the victims are found in the Green River. The notorious killer evades identification for decades, despite being arrested twice.

programme.title: Planet Earth: A Celebration
programme.desc: This program highlights eight of the most extraordinary sequences from 'Planet Earth II' and 'Blue Planet II.' In addition to new narration, the sequences will include an arrangement of original scores from composer Hans Zimmer and Jacob Shea.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Summer
programme.desc: The few short weeks of an Alaskan summer must sustain the abundant wildlife for the whole year. No season brings more surprises. There is a predictable wealth of riches, but there is so little time to master the art of survival.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Winter
programme.desc: The vast mountains, the surrounding oceans and the northerly latitude combine to deliver one of the most extreme winters on the planet.

programme.title: Life Story: First Steps
programme.desc: Each and every animal is born with a chance to survive, thrive and produce their very own next generation. The first hurdle in life is infancy.

programme.title: Life Story: Growing Up
programme.desc: In the journey towards adulthood, a moment comes for all animals when they must strike out on their own.

programme.title: Life Story: Home
programme.desc: To survive, animals need somewhere to live, a place that provides the necessities of life, shelter from the elements and refuge from enemies.

programme.title: Life Story: Power
programme.desc: An individual's life journey interweaves with many others. Those who are successful know when to fight or back down, when to cooperate or to go it alone and how to manipulate and deceive.

programme.title: Life Story: Courtship
programme.desc: Competition to win a partner has created both the most extraordinary beauty and life-threatening violence found anywhere in nature. The stakes could not be higher: without a mate, the journey of life ends.

programme.title: Life Story: Parenthood
programme.desc: Raising offspring and continuing the line is the next best thing to immortality.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Empire of the Amazon
programme.desc: New evidence could lead to the discovery of an unknown ancient civilization in the Amazon rainforest. An island disappears, and investigators are mystified. An unidentified submarine is spotted in a North Korean shipyard.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Treasure of the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Strange spots near the Grand Canyon may hold clues to the legendary treasure of a notorious bandit. Satellite images could explain desert ruins rumored to be an entrance to an underworld. A city-size chunk of ice suddenly disappears in Antarctica.

programme.title: What on Earth?: World's Deadliest Threats
programme.desc: The world's most dangerous threats are in top-secret locations all over the planet, and using cutting-edge technology, experts reveal the truth behind these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Stonehenge
programme.desc: A mysterious Stonehenge-like structure in Russia might have links to the Nazis. Experts uncover clues to a mega-tsunami with the power to devastate the United States. A huge lake appears in the Sahara overnight, and its explanation could be mythical.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Flowers on the Road
programme.desc: Two lost souls unlucky in love, Frank and Angelina Rodriguez, have found soulmates in each other. But in September 2000, a sudden death leads investigators to uncover a shocking tale of how one person's compulsion can turn into murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Alaskan Temptress
programme.desc: A Washington community is shocked when PTA mom, Mechele Linehan is arrested for murder from a decade earlier in Alaska. Details of a seedy and sordid past emerge. But is this suburban mother a cold-blooded temptress or has she been wrongly accused?

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Mercy
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in what appears to be a home-invasion robbery. Closer inspection makes detectives believe it was a personal attack, and look for suspects, including his wife.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Candy Run
programme.desc: A family's nightmare begins in September 2014 when 8-year-old Hiawayi Robinson leaves her apartment to play but never returns. The desperate search to find her leads investigators to surveillance footage that sends shockwaves through the community.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: This Guy's Getting Paranoid
programme.desc: Roaa Al-Dhanoon has disappeared. What begins as a missing persons case, takes a disturbing turn by someone who is closest to her. Now, detectives must unravel a complex web of deceit that continues to strike fear throughout the devastated community.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Girl in the Crowd
programme.desc: What starts as a calm night at the American Legion in Evansville, Indiana, quickly takes a turn when Anthony Blaylock is shot dead. But when detectives obtain video surveillance showing who is responsible, they stop at nothing to find his killer.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Terror in the Court
programme.desc: A father lunges at a militia member; a defendant sucker punches a lawyer; a woman is chased by a judge; a man threatens to kill his family; a deputy attacks a defendant; a drunk driver crashes into a courthouse; and a proposal shocks a probation officer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Albuquerque Ambush
programme.desc: Don Fluitt is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, security video captures the moments just before the evil deed and a surprising twist will bring this killer to their knees.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Blind Love
programme.desc: Thirty-one-year-old, Gabriel Montanez is found shot in a liquor store parking lot in Kalamazoo, Michigan. Two men in hooded sweatshirts are seen fleeing from the scene. Police then make a shocking discovery that leads to the truth behind the homicide.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Sex, Lies and Crimes
programme.desc: A scandalous affair between a tutor and student; Young father's shocking lie; An attorney blindsided by an angry client's fist; Man threatens to kill judge; Bailiff's shoe saves an escapee's life; Judge and defendant have shared past.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Carl
programme.desc: August 18, 2015. 36-year-old Carl Starke is shot dead in cold blood close to his home in St. Augustine, Florida. There are no witnesses, but neighbours did hear shots. Armed with a likely time of death, police turn to CCTV to help hunt his killer.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Two Sides of Charlotte
programme.desc: Two sides of Charlotte collide when Detective Garry McFadden finds himself investigating the murder of a beloved elderly 'church lady' from 'old Charlotte money' who was robbed and attacked in her home as she returned from church.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Philadelphia Freedom
programme.desc: When a nursing student is pulled from her smoldering home, Detective McFadden must confront her lover, ex-boyfriend, and best friend - to learn who lit the match.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Shadow of Suspicion
programme.desc: A young woman travels to California in pursuit of a Hollywood dream and winds up the victim of a savage homicide.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A compassionate and outgoing woman's dream vacation turns into a deadly nightmare when she crosses paths with a wolf in sheep's clothing.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: The Fugitive Son
programme.desc: A star athlete from a wealthy family brutally rapes several teenage girls and threatens to kill them if they tell anyone.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: St. George's Hidden Dragons
programme.desc: An elite private school is under fire for decades-old allegations of sexual abuse of students by staff members. How high will the number of victims and perpetrators climb? And how deep did the cover-up go?

programme.title: Disappeared: Breaking Away
programme.desc: 19-year-old college sophomore Martin Roberts is a popular fraternity brother. Suddenly he goes missing. The only clue he leaves: a cryptic note. Baffling secrets emerge. But 2 years later, his family remains desperate to know what has happened to him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son is Damaged Goods
programme.desc: Jeanne Avsenew and her young son Peter were close, but as Peter matured, his obsession with death grew. The day Jeanne finds a bullet with her name scrawled on it, she realizes her son wants her dead, and Jeanne must take drastic measures to keep safe.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Murdered in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: When Aliza Sherman is stabbed to death in broad daylight, police are convinced the attack was premeditated, and Aliza may have known her killer. Then, the fire that kills Sheila Deviney is ruled an accident until new evidence points to arson and murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Flight Risk
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving Day 2018, in the mountains of Colorado a young pilot goes missing without a trace, leaving behind her baby. Police follow the few clues they have and unravel a story far more bizarre and horrifying than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Bad for Business
programme.desc: Successful business owner MaryAnn Clibbery is brutally murdered at the remodeling business she owned in Loves Park, Illinois. The murder shocks the town. Then a suspicious bag found floating on the ice in the river unlocks the mystery of her slaying.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Message in Red
programme.desc: When a beloved couple is gunned down in the presence of children, a cryptic message scrawled across the home leads police to suspect the crime may be drug related. The only problem is, there's no evidence the victims had any involvement in the drug trade.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Silver Peak's Secret
programme.desc: Charlie Kinkel goes missing in a remote Nevada mining town. His wife Trayce investigates but is shunned by locals. When a body is discovered, detectives break down the silence to reveal Charlie's murder was a tragic case of misplaced suspicion.

programme.title: Cocaine King: El Negro
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Russian Arms Dealer
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Death Certificate
programme.desc: After witnessing a murder, Anthony Ragno goes on the run. Building a new life trafficking pot in the Haitian islands, a coke addiction and close calls with local governments drive Ragno back to the US with a fake name.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Raps
programme.desc: Raymond Ross skips town after beating a teen into a coma. With his cousin, who is also wanted, Ross enters the drug scene selling dope and his own music. After a close call, Ross decides to let loose and party hard while police close in on this trail.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Lock and Load
programme.desc: A Texas separatist group takes two hostages. Rangers are able to negotiate the release, however two members, Richard Keyes and Mike Matson get away, evading helicopters and dogs. Using an underground militia group, Keyes hides out in the woods undetected.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Two Homes in Mexico
programme.desc: Gonzolo Martinez is a 17-year old gang member, sentenced to 48 years in prison. A chance arises, and Martinez escapes to Mexico and becomes a drug dealer. Only when Martinez tries to cross the border, do the feds get their chance to capture him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Bridge to Freedom
programme.desc: Nicholas Johnson was a teen robber who terrorized the streets of Portland, Oregon, but after getting caught, he planed an elaborate escape.

programme.title: Bluey: Ice Cream/ Bad Mood/ Double Babysitter
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream. Bingo is playing Bad Mood with Dad. Two babysitters turn up to look after Bluey and Bingo!

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.desc: The Cassidy family lives in a world with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Jane's Perfect Present/ Pterodactyl-Doodle-Doo
programme.desc: The Cassidy family lives in a world with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Wonder-Bob/ Yay, Earth Day!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Heroes of the Sky
programme.desc: When Luna, goes on a mission and loses her memory as a result, Catboy and Gekko give up on her. The PJ Masks learn that the heart of being a hero is being a good friend.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: It's a Hap-Hap-Happy Hot Dog Hills!/ Happy Friend-iversary!
programme.desc: Buddy McBilly is so happy that he makes it his job to make sure everyone in town is happy too! Minnie and Daisy set up a surprise 'Happy Friend-Iversary' party for Cuckoo Loca!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Wheelchair Pals / Super-Duper-Stitious Day!
programme.desc: When Goofy is confined to a wheelchair before his dance competiiton, his pal, Chester teaches him a wheelchair dance just in time. It's Friday the 13th!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Birthday Heros for Hero / Maple Cheer-Up
programme.desc: The pups must fix Hero's new birthday toy after Rolly and Keia accidentally break it. The Pugs head to Canada to save Bob's pancake surprise for Bonnie!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Bluey: Hammerbarn / Featherwand / Dance Mode
programme.desc: The Heelers take a trip to Hammerbarn. Bingo has an idea for a new game. By waving her featherwand she can make objects impossibly heavy. Dad eats Bingo's last chip.

programme.title: Bluey: Easter/ Barky Boats/ Escape
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Safety Third/ Mister Manners
programme.desc: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him a replica of the car. Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the Princess of England.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dadlantis/ Chloe Rules!
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe become eco-warriors when they save the underwater city of Atlantis from a dangerous 'sea monster.' Timmy regrets wishing Chloe was the school hall monitor when he sees how seriously she takes the job.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Big Fairy Share Scare
programme.desc: Timmy finds out that he has to share his fairies with the new girl in school, Chloe Carmichael. But when Chloe realizes she can use her magic for good, she wishes everyone in Dimmsdale would share everything, and chaos ensues.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Con/ The Hungry Games
programme.desc: Mr. Crocker creates Wonky Cosmo and Wanda clones to get into a Fairy Convention to steal all the fairies' magic. Timmy wishes Chloe could live out her favorite dystopian movie, but quickly regrets it when everyone is hungry.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fool's Day Out/ Deja Vu
programme.desc: Timmy calls upon the April Fool for help, then wishes for a button to reset any day.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Tree House/ Saving Simon
programme.desc: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they made it their home. Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to stop his departure and keep him at home.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to School/ Bromance
programme.desc: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ Copy Can't
programme.desc: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado; Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: The Casagrandes

programme.title: The Loud House: The Butterfly Effect/ The Green House

programme.title: The Loud House: House Music/ A Novel Idea

programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The New Leaf/ Once Bitten
programme.desc: In the battle for fast food supremacy, Plankton has decided to throw in the towel and start a new business selling trinkets and souvenirs; Gary starts biting everyone in town, and Squidward is convinced that he has a rare snail disease.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for as long as anyone can remember, but Mr. Krabs explains that this wasn't always the case. Flashbacks reveal how their friendship went sour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Sponge/ Sing a Song of Patrick
programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: It's Pony: Horace/The Boot
programme.desc: Annie can avoid detention if she can heal the principal's dying plant, but the plan goes awry when Pony becomes attached to it. Pony's half-baked plan causes Annie to lose one of her boots, which she desperately needs for a family photo!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Splinter/ Slide Whistle Stooges
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally gets a splinter, but he's afraid Mr. Krabs will send him home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sand Castles in the Sand/ Shell Shocked
programme.desc: A friendly day of building sand castles soon turns into all out war when SpongeBob and Patrick use their sand creations to battle each other. When Gary's shell breaks, SpongeBob tries to find him a replacement.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale of a Birthday
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants to give his daughter, Pearl, the best birthday ever. While he works on the party, SpongeBob is assigned the task of figuring out what Pearl would like for a present.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Driven to Tears/ Rule of Dumb
programme.desc: Sponge Bob fails his driver's test again, Pat asks them to prove the test can be passed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab and turns it into an ice skating rink.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pink Purloiner/ Squid Wood
programme.desc: Rejected by Squidward, SpongeBob decides to make his own Squid ventriloquist dummy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Giant Squidward/ No Nose Knows
programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Rise and Shine/ Waiting/ Fungus Among Us
programme.desc: A look inside Patrick Star's rock, and his daily routine. SpongeBob finds out his favourite cereal has a mail in prize and goes to great length to get the toy, but earning the toy proves easier than waiting for it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Big One
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward and Mr. Krabs are swept away by a giant wave.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Earth's Last Stand

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: City at War

programme.desc: When Leonardo secretly allies himself with Kara, he gets himself into deeper danger than he could have realized.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Bat in the Belfry
programme.desc: Mikey befriends two odd new Superheroes, Wingnut and Screwloose.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Toy/ Bloodlines

programme.desc: When Alvin makes fun of Simon's magic act, Simon challenges him to a magic duel. Who will win? The amazing Alvin or Simon the Superb? Alvin reluctantly signs up to teach the after school music class, but he finds his classmates treat him differently.

programme.desc: Simon's experiment of how plants respond to positive or negative feedback creates a monster, and it is growing. Brittany's fear of bees turns into admiration when she's shrunk down to their size and experiences life as a bee.

programme.desc: When Alvin notices Brittany being nice to him he's sure an alien has taken over her body. In order to earn a job on the school newspaper, Alvin helps Simon uncover the biggest story the school's ever seen.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pizza Dash/ Glory Days
programme.desc: The town is under attack when Simon creates a drone that can not only deliver pizzas but has the ability to learn.Alvin worries the munks are responsible for making Dave boring when they find out he used to be a rock star.

programme.desc: Timmy lands the role of Cleft, the Boy Chin Wonder; Timmy uses Vickie's diary for revenge.

programme.desc: Timmy wishes Sparky was a human. Timmy becomes a dog and has to convince Sparky to change back to canine form. Timmy wishes Mr. Crocker would disappear. Mr. Crocker becomes invisible. Dad thinks the house is haunted.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Anti-Poof
programme.desc: For every fairy, there's an anti-fairy - thus anti-Poof is born -FOOP!

programme.desc: Cosmo's magic trash bags invite disaster; Fairy World is watching Timmy TV.

programme.desc: Dad takes the Squirrely Scouts on a camping trip and forgets all the supplies. Timmy tries to make the most of their trip by telling a collection of scary stories around a campfire.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Enter the Nosepicker/ Hide and Shriek
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally lures a Nose Picker into the hotel. Later, Mavis finds her childhood toy, Demented Debbie, in the attic.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Bad Friday/ Hoop Screams
programme.desc: The monsters celebrate bad Friday by trying to win the Screamie for the best scare. Mavis gives Hank the gift of basketball.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Buggin' Out/ How Do You Solve a Problem Like Medusa
programme.desc: While doing her chores around the hotel, Mavis mistakes truth bugs for bed bugs. Mavis invites Lydia's high school rival to the hotel.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Adventures in Vampiresitting/ Phlegm Ball
programme.desc: The kids get trapped in a human house. Mavis' cousin shows up and challenges her to a game of phlegm ball.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Wendy Big and Tall/ Doppelfanger
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally turns Wendy into a ginormous, blobby version of her little self. Mavis' teen crush, Jett Black, visits the hotel.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Great Eggspectations/ Hotel Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Mavis tries to prove she can care for a living creature by rescuing a 'bad egg.' The kids try to watch the last episode of their favourite show, Hotel Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Breakfast at Lydia's/ The Trouble With Wendys
programme.desc: Mavis wins employee of the month and the right to share breakfast with Aunt Lydia. Later, Dr. Gillman saves Wendy's ponytail and now she's indebted to him.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Frankenstunt/ What About Blob
programme.desc: Hank has to pretend to be his dad as he films his new action flick. Mavis and Wendy set up Aunt Lydia and Bob Blob on a date.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Curse Club/ Casket if you Can
programme.desc: Pedro desperately tries to throw a curse. Mavis loses a casket with Aunt Lydia resting inside.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: A Scare to Remember/ Hank and the Real Boy
programme.desc: Aunt Lydia's favourite author is coming to the hotel. The kids cleaned their room so fast, they accidentally got rid of the real ghost writer.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Wrapture/ Becoming Klaus
programme.desc: Mavis needs to quickly replace Pedro's mummy wraps, which were accidently destroyed. A random selection, however, proves problematic as Pedro's personality is transformed. Mavis needs a fang transplant and her cousin Klaus offers to help.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: 116 Candles/ Stop or My Mummy Will Shout
programme.desc: Mavis accidentally turns Aunt Lydia into a teenager.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fright of Hand/ Dude Where's My Garlic?
programme.desc: Mavis goes a bit too far in wanting to show Aunt Lydia she can throw a proper party.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Bat Flap Fever/ Thumb and Thumber
programme.desc: Mavis is horrified by her dad's new Mavy-Wavy fashion wings.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Legend of Pumpkin Guts
programme.desc: Mavis is determined to break out of lockdown on Halloween.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Brain Drain/ Hair Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: Aunt Lydia snags Pandora's Box from Mavis and asks Zombie Isaac Newton to figure out how to open it. Unfortunately, a brain swap between him and Hank creates bigger problems. When Medusa comes to Hotel Transylvania, Aunt Lydia's hair acts up.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Drop the Needle/ Really Gross Anatomy
programme.desc: Mavis agrees to teach Klaus to bat out if he shows her how to replace the needle on Aunt Lydia's gramophone. Dr. Gillman gets an education on medicine from Mavis and the crew, though no one really has much knowledge on the subject.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Fright Before Creepmas

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Last Days of Glenn Frey: Heartache Tonight
programme.desc: Glenn Frey was a multi-talented musician and along with Don Henley, co-founded the legendary band, the Eagles. When he died in 2016, his fans were shocked because he was still playing the music they loved.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: The Tiger Attack (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 2003, the wildly successful careers of master illusionists Siegfried & Roy comes to a shockingly abrupt end when one of the team’s prized tigers bites Roy Horn on the neck and drags him offstage.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: Dangerous Illusion (Part 2)
programme.desc: Roy tries to recover from severe wounds inflicted by his beloved tiger Mantacore, but the team’s excuses for the animal’s behavior lose credibility upon further investigation.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Escape From Dannemora: Killers on the Loose (Part 1)
programme.desc: Two dangerous killers break out of one of New York’s toughest prisons. Convicted murderers Richard Matt and David Sweat cut through steel walls, crawl through steampipes and get their way through a maze of tunnels on their way to freedom.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Escape From Dannemora: Getaway Car (Part 2)
programme.desc: The manhunt for escaped prisoners Richard Matt and David Sweat was growing, expanding from the United States to Canada. Thousands of leads were being followed, but weeks into the search, there was still no sign of the missing men.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Honey I Torched the Homestead
programme.desc: Fire is a constant threat for this Oregon homestead. Livestock should be meat, but here they are family pets. The Raneys must teach a hungry family to working together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Burned Out
programme.desc: In Northern California, the Raneys give a masterclass on rebuilding from scratch when they come to the aid of the Olson-Wilcox family whose homestead was completely destroyed in a devastating wildfire.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake on the Forty
programme.desc: The Raneys return to Alaska to discover their own homestead in utter disrepair. Beetle kill has destroyed their only access, so they race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown
programme.desc: The Raneys arrive on a homestead in Missouri's Tornado Alley to find the Rudolphs having just survived a tornado. Living in a crumbling cabin surrounded by dangerous trees, the Rudolphs also face predators, ticks and no power or clean water source.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Life or Death in Michigan
programme.desc: The old well Marty's come to fix has already claimed a victim. To set the Dagues on a path to self-sufficiency, the Raneys try to deliver a long-term water source, protein supply, and sustainable power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Winter's Fury
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty Raney help the Russell family struggling on a failing homestead in the forests of Pennsylvania. During the biggest storm of the century, the family faces a food shortage with no hunting skills and a cabin on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown
programme.desc: The Raneys arrive on a homestead in Missouri's Tornado Alley to find the Rudolphs having just survived a tornado. Living in a crumbling cabin surrounded by dangerous trees, the Rudolphs also face predators, ticks and no power or clean water source.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Abandoned and Alone
programme.desc: In Montana, the Raneys help Beth and Mike Ettinger who live in an abandoned ghost town where many previous homesteaders failed. Survival is a battle on this homestead that is stalked by a mountain lion and void of any livestock, water or food.

programme.title: Secrets of Interrogation
programme.desc: A look inside the interrogation room to uncover the secrets police use to get their suspects to confess.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Lightning Strike, Fighter Jet
programme.desc: Lightning hits an oil tank causing it to explode; a fighter jet crashes during a show.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Deep Smoothy
programme.desc: Jimmy fishes solo in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Salmon on Restigouche River
programme.desc: We're chasing Atlantic Salmon on Canada's Restigouche River.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Miami-Dade County: Inlet Magic
programme.desc: Fishing for snook, mangrove snapper, black and gag groups, big jack crevalle, and oversize barracuda takes place at Miami's Haulover Inlet.

programme.title: Local Knowledge: Wahoo or Bust
programme.desc: Ali and Rush put the lures in the Key West for wahoo.

programme.title: Into the Blue: Dropping Deep
programme.desc: Steve and Scott head offshore for Deep Dropping action.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience: Spearfishing Upper Keys
programme.desc: Rich's son Reed guides Rich and Tom in spearfishing in the upper Florida Keys.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Ancient City Slam
programme.desc: Fishing for trout, redfish and flounder takes place at St. Augustine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Gold Vault Gamble
programme.desc: Team foreman Jason takes a huge gamble by opening a new cut. But when the team is besieged by mishaps, Dave returns to find the team in disarray and fights to prove the Vault Cut is a risk willing to take.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Exotic Animal Keeper
programme.desc: Mike gets dirty at a recycling center in San Francisco that requires its drivers to clean out the backs of their garbage-hauling dump trucks after every shift. Then Mike plays with exotic animals and cleans a cougar-sized kitty litter box.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Poo Pot Maker
programme.desc: Just when Mike thought he had seen it all, he is hired at a cow farm that specializes in making gardening pots out of cattle poop. Mike later opens up the mailbag and answers a viewer's question on a segment where Mike is bitten by a snake.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Salt Miner
programme.desc: Mike goes underground packing explosives into a wall of salt and blowing it up in order to break up the salt into small blocks. Mike masters the dirty job of salt mining and gets a new respect for the people who get dirty so the public can have salt.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Steam Ship Cleaner
programme.desc: Travelling to San Diego, Mike joins forces with two dirty guys who have mastered the art of hydro seeding. Before diving into the mailbag to answer viewer's questions, Mike rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty on a steam ship that's over 100 years old.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Greenland Shark Quest
programme.desc: Mike Rowe heads to Greenland to learn about one of the more obscure sharks.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cave Biologist
programme.desc: Mike Rowe works with a cave biologist and then braves the high seas in search of slime eels.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Snake Wrangler
programme.desc: Mike Rowe travels to Texas and joins forces with a local snake farm that is dedicated to raising some of the biggest and most dangerous snakes in the world. It's a dirty job that has Mike scared for his life as he moves giant and at times angry snakes.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Polygamist and Proud!
programme.desc: The Snowdens have a new girlfriend! The Merrifields take drastic measures to bring their Brazilian bombshell fiancee into their family. After their first wife left, the Joneses are ready to seek again. The Clarks have turmoil in their plural kingdom.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Irreconcilable Differences
programme.desc: Tosha makes a bold confession to her mom. Despite their family's concern, the Merrifields forge ahead with their plans for potential sister wife Roberta. Vanessa and Kaleh clash over their differences. The Snowdens' new girlfriend reveals a secret.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: I Gotta Have Faith
programme.desc: The Merrifields head to Mexico to reunite with fiancee Roberta. The plot thickens as the Snowdens reveal a new twist in their world. Rather than search online, the Joneses go out on the town. Life in the Winder home is looking very different these days.

programme.title: The Blended Bunch: Modern Day Brady Bunch
programme.desc: A surprise announcement sends Erica's brother reeling.

programme.title: The Blended Bunch: Let's Talk About Sex
programme.desc: Aimee's mom, Rachel, comes to visit, stirring up Erica's insecurities and causing a confrontation with Paige and Dave. As if family drama isn't enough, Erica and Spencer need to have 'the sex talk' with the older kids.

programme.title: The Blended Bunch: Step Kid Swap
programme.desc: Erica and Spencer have a step-kid swap so each parent can build a better bond with their step-children. Then, the time has come for four of Erica's seven kids to get their annual MRI screening for cancer cells, and Quinn has a bone to pick with Spencer.

programme.title: The Blended Bunch: Nature Calls
programme.desc: The Shemwells take the family on a camping trip and must contend with potty training the three youngest children. Meanwhile, Emma and Harper can't get along, and Tanner is jealous of stepbrother Brayden. Erica finally opens up to Spencer about her fears.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Bridal Highs and Woes

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Wedding Gown Bro Down

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Runaway Bride, Runaway Budget

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Mother May I?

programme.title: Mom: A Pirate, Three Frogs and a Prince

programme.title: Young Sheldon: An Eagle Feather, a String Bean and An Eskimo

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Demons, Sunday School and Prime Numbers

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Computer, a Plastic Pony and a Case of Beer

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Potato Salad, a Broomstick and Dad's Whiskey
programme.desc: When Mary takes a job as church secretary, she finds herself becoming pastor Jeff's marriage counselor. Also, Sheldon and Missy spend their first afternoon home alone.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cave Dwelling Sponge/ The Clam Whisperer

programme.title: The Loud House: Predict Ability / Driving Ambition

programme.title: The Loud House: A Grave Mistake/ Leader of the Rack

programme.title: The Loud House: Ruthless People/ What Wood Lincoln Do?
