programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Andy Richter

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Highlights from the High Seas

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature

programme.desc: A man at a gas pump doesn't notice his car rolling away right behind him, while a bride and groom get sent to jail for DUI.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Drivers 13
programme.desc: Warning: Driving clips in this show are dumber than they appear! A nitro-burning school bus, recreation vehicles used for purposes other than fun and a prominent baseball player who puts up big numbers on the breathalyser are featured.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme
programme.desc: The chefs are asked to replicate the deep-fried chicken of KFC for Steve Lemee and Kevin Heffernan, the stars of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: James Van Der Beek
programme.desc: 90s heartthrob James Van Der Beek challenges the chefs to create and remix a delectable and iconic Californian burger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Modern Family: Two Monkeys and a Panda
programme.desc: While Claire runs herself ragged trying to play peacemaker with Haley and Alex, Phil sneaks off for a relaxing day at the spa. Gloria is horrified by Jay's plans to purchase two primo side-by-side crypts. Cameron decides to become an author.

programme.title: Modern Family: Someone to Watch Over Lily
programme.desc: Mitchell and Cameron look to assign legal guardians for Lily, in case anything happens to them, and secretly assess their family members. What they witness puts doubts in their minds.

programme.title: Modern Family: See You Next Fall
programme.desc: The whole family is gathering at Jay's before heading out to Alex's graduation ceremony from middle school. Jay is preoccupied, hiding a Botox mishap from everyone, and Cameron is upset about Mitchell's habit of laughing at his expense.

programme.title: Modern Family: Phil on Wire
programme.desc: The growing bond between Jay and his dog is grating on Gloria's nerves. Phil and Luke embark on a new adventure involving a tightrope, while Claire missteps as she tries to teach the girls a life lesson.

programme.title: Modern Family: Me? Jealous?
programme.desc: Phil is so preoccupied with impressing his new business partner that he doesn't realize the man is being overtly inappropriate with Claire.

programme.title: Modern Family: Virgin Territory
programme.desc: It's a day of disturbing realizations when Mitchell manages to ruin one of Jay's proudest golf moments, Phil overhears something that may forever change how he sees his little girl and Gloria stumbles upon Claire's dangerous little secret.

programme.title: Modern Family: Leap Day
programme.desc: Cameron's birthday falls on Leap Day, and with opportunities to celebrate so few and far between, the pressure for Mitchell to get it right is exceptional.

programme.title: Modern Family: My Hero
programme.desc: Mitch’s ex-boyfriend, Teddy, a very personable and successful doctor, invites the whole family to a fundraising event at the local roller rink and they all run circles around each other.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Feud
programme.desc: Phil is upset to have lost his elected office of social chair to his nemesis Gil Thorpe, and when he finds out Luke is competing against Gil's kid in a wrestling match, it becomes his own personal battle.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Day Alex Left for College
programme.desc: Phil and Claire are feeling a little snubbed by their kids when Alex intentionally gives them the wrong college move-in date to avoid making it a big deal. Meanwhile, Luke seems less than eager to spend the day with Phil at his open house.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Verdict
programme.desc: Claire is excited to give Haley and Alex a great experience for 'Bring Your Daughter to Work Day' but the staff is not making it easy. Elsewhere, Phil takes Luke and Manny's class out for community service day.

programme.title: Modern Family: In Your Head
programme.desc: When Luke goes missing after a night out in a sketchy neighbourhood, Manny, Phil and Gloria team up to track him down.

programme.title: True Hollywood Story: Star Sisters
programme.desc: Beyoncé, Britney, and Miley may have blazed the brightest trails, but Solange, Jamie Lynn, and Noah learned from their siblings' pitfalls to succeed on their own. We explore these iconic sisters, their rise to fame and the deep bonds between them.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: New Friends and The Bunker
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are curious about Kourtney's new friend, Addison Rae. Scared by the state of the world, Kim takes measures to prepare for the future, while Kris is afraid to let her mom celebrate her birthday during a pandemic.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Diamonds Are Forever
programme.desc: Scott's behavior takes a turn for the worse after learning that Kourtney officially has a boyfriend. Meanwhile Kourtney struggles to find her career passion, and Kris comes up with a creative way to preserve her memory long after she's gone.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Tangled Web
programme.desc: Kim fears for her surrogate's safety when sources begin exposing her personal information, Kris keeps a watchful eye on Scott during Fashion Week, and Kourtney deals with a scary infestation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kris Jenner's Legacy
programme.desc: When Scott realizes that the girls know very little about Kris's history, he sets out to make her a commemorative legacy video. Meanwhile Kendall's anxiety strikes again right before Milan Fashion week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Trimester Trouble
programme.desc: Khloé attempts to keep her pregnancy a secret while dealing with some complications, Kourtney questions whether she's done having kids, and Kris debuts a loud new hairdo.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Gender Reveal
programme.desc: The girls take one last sister getaway to San Francisco before their babies arrive, but they quickly get fed up with Kourtney's bad attitude. Kim wants to include her family is the surrogacy process, and Khloe anxiously awaits to hear her baby's gender.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Photo Shoot Dispute
programme.desc: A fight over the family Christmas card escalates into a major feud between Kourtney, Kim, and Khloé. Meanwhile, Scott feels guilty for moving on to a new relationship.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Art of the Prank
programme.desc: Kim and Khloé try to get to the root of Kourtney's bad attitude, which ignites another huge fight between the girls.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Drop Dead Gorgeous
programme.desc: Kris worries that pregnant Khloé is taking her healthy lifestyle too far and putting her baby at risk. Meanwhile Scott's business trip to Miami takes a wild turn, jeopardizing an exciting new business venture.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: Kourtney ponders taking a holiday during the holidays to get away from non-stop fighting with her sisters. Khloé tries to avoid the public eye until it's time for her pregnancy announcement. Kris is worried that she's being poisoned.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Family Feud
programme.desc: Kourtney is devastated when Scott introduces the kids to his girlfriend without her permission. Meanwhile the family is determined to redeem themselves on Celebrity Family Feud at all costs, and Kim encounters an issue with her selfie taking.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: Diva Tea: Iggy Azalea and Trixie Mattel
programme.desc: Lisa throws a proper English Tea with some very improper conversation as Iggy Azalea and Trixie Mattel share tales of red carpet underwear fails, one-night stands, and a famous baby daddy!

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: Cabo Fiesta: Tori Spelling and Jeff Lewis
programme.desc: Lisa recreates her favorite moments from years of vacationing in Mexico with a night of margaritas, seafood, surprise secrets, and wild dares with Tori Spelling and Jeff Lewis.

programme.title: Movie: Knocked Up
programme.desc: When a fun-loving guy impregnates an up-and-coming entertainment journalist, they put their differences aside and take a shot at love.

programme.title: Movie: The Change-Up
programme.desc: Hilarity ensues when two wildly different men swap bodies and must then cope with their new lives.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unconventional Comforts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to the east coast of Oahu and visits a general store serving traditional Hawaiian dishes. In Chicago, an Italian family is serving sandwiches made from scratch, and in Hernando, an underground cafe serving French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavortown Medley
programme.desc: A Memphis bar-turned-bistro offers low brow favourites; a food truck in Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eurocentric
programme.desc: Guy feasts on the many tastes of Europe in places across the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fish, Fries and Feet
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's tackling everything from land to sea. In Des Moines, the funky fusion joint serving up unique burritos alongside off-the-chain bulgogi masa fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grillin', Chillin' and Huli Huli Chicken
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy is heading to unique grills on the mainland. The first stop is a husband a wife duo serving up classic Americana with a 21st century twist.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Food, Small Towns
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's stopping in small towns to dig in to big-time eats. In Raymond, N.H., a blow-your-mind butchery loadin' up their burgers and crankin' out scratch-made corn dogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bird and Beef
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns to bagels. In Portsmouth, an amped up deli serves up lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Appeal
programme.desc: Guy's going on an international flavorfest.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly, Beef and Bratwurst
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hittin' the road and diggin' into some serious meat. In Atlanta, a funky Asian spot putting out prime-time pork belly and wok-fried chicken. In Vancouver, an elevated diner dishing out duck pancakes and not-your-momma's meatloaf.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Off the Beaten Path
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's taking a detour to find some not-your-everyday eats. In Richmond, Va., a jammin' Jamaican joint serving outrageous oxtail and fried chicken with true island flavour.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Dinner and Dessert That Delivers
programme.desc: Guy and his family combine their love of cooking at home and great restaurant food for some takeout. Four DDD alums send ingredients for their best recipes then join Guy and his son via video chat to guide them through the recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bagels, Biscuit and Boar
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into all kinds of flavour, starting in Santa Fe, N.M., at a pub serving comfort grub like chicken and biscuits and in-the-shell clam chowder. Also, a spot in Reno, NV, is on its game with a double elk chop and wild boar spaetzle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken Trifecta
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into some winner winner chicken dinners! In Maui, Hawaii, it's a star-studded stop at Mick Fleetwood's joint serving the rocker's mom's favourite chicken, plus a dish that musician Sammy Hagar dives right into.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Servin' Up San Francisco
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's cruising the San Francisco coast for a diverse culinary road trip. First, Guy swings by the repurposed garage in the Mission District for some southern hospitality.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly, Beef and Bratwurst

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha Goes to Boot Camp
programme.desc: Trisha and her friend, Natalie, suit up for boot camp. Afterwards, they whip up a menu low on calories but high on flavor, including kale chips, lemon orzo chicken soup, chickpea salad sandwiches and an angel food cake with grapefruit compote.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Reunion With a Song
programme.desc: After being on the road performing for more than three years, Trisha Yearwood is ready to spend some time with her family. She throws a family reunion to catch up and share some great food. Her menu includes grilled potato salad and back cheeseburgers.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Bringing The Outdoors In
programme.desc: Valerie combines cuisine with camping for a festive picnic.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Take Me Out to the Ball Game
programme.desc: Valerie's always been a football fan, but today Valerie's longtime friend, Lisa, and her husband, former baseball player Billy Ashley, are going to show Valerie how much fun baseball culture can be.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Happy Hour
programme.desc: It's happy hour at the Boarding House that Ree Drummond and her family have opened in Pawhuska, Oklahoma, and she is surprising guests with a fantastic cocktail hour spread.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Osage Cowboy's Lunch
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making a classic cowboy lunch for her husband, Ladd, and the other cowboys. She starts with a cheeseburger meatloaf that's everything they love about two favorite foods in one dish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Kid-Approved
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing 100-percent kid-approved recipes that are all quick and easy to make. She starts with mini burgers and bite-sized fries for her fun waffle fry sliders, and the speedy 4-cheese pepperoni pizzadilla.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Sheet Pan Adventures
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is going on a sheet pan adventure, and first up is a roasted sheet pan salad served right in the pan, followed by one big meatloaf. She also makes mega mac and cheese and a jumbo breakfast of her sheet pan pancake with three toppings.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Simple Shabbat Dinner, Perfect Sunday Morning Breakfast
programme.desc: Molly Yeh and her husband celebrate Shabbat with a delicious, no-stress dinner. Molly makes orange juice challah, shawarma stuffed peppers and gingersnap coconut icebox cake. Then she uses leftover challah in strawberries and cream stuffed French toast.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Brunch Club Strikes Again
programme.desc: It's Molly Yeh's turn to host brunch club with her friends again, so she makes blueberry cream cheese scones with yogurt glaze, bacon hasselback sweet potatoes, pita and greens benedict with feta cream and caraway bloody marys with mini reubens.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: Inspired by their favourite guilty-pleasure treats, Trisha Yearwood cooks a meal of indulgent foods for her friends, Glenda and Callie. The menu includes loaded Southern disco fries and the most over-the-top party burger.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: A Southern Heart-to-Heart with Kelsea Ballerini
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites Kelsea Ballerini over to share stories from their journeys in country music. Kelsea represents the new wave of female country artists who, like Trisha and the trailblazing musicians before her, are empowering young women today.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Spring to It!
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts share simple, seasonal dinners for every night of the week, starting with cavatelli with asparagus, lemon and fresh ricotta. There's also a family-friendly easy wedge salad, black sea bass en papillote and magic mousse for dessert.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Diner Classics
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows diners, so when his chef friends come to the ranch with their version of diner classics, they bring their A-game.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Frostbite
programme.desc: In Talkeetna, Alaska, the three teams scavenge for a local favorite, chaga mushrooms. Tyler Florence is forced to give some harsh feedback and issues a challenge to help them turn things around as elimination decides the final two teams for the finale.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Clearance Wars
programme.desc: Everything in Flavortown must go, and Guy Fieri has the perfect solution: a clearance war! He gives four chefs a list of clearance items that they must use over the course of the competition.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Pizza Pro Playoffs
programme.desc: Four professional pizza makers rise to the occasion in three pizza-themed Grocery Games that determine who gets to take home all the dough. Guy Fieri challenges the chefs to shop for the ingredients in their signature pizza using only a mini pizza box.

programme.desc: The slow loris has a tiny window for breeding, so staff anxiously help a potential pair connect. The veterinary team develop ground-breaking techniques to treat the stoic pigeons and an okapi with a limp gets a helping hand.

programme.title: The Zoo: Moving Day
programme.desc: The Zoo's huge male sea lion is in rut, and staff need to move the younger males before he comes territorial. The veterinary team come up with an ingenious solution to repair Dinky the Flamingo's broken ankle. And feeding a rock python proves challenging.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cracking a Cold Case
programme.desc: Officer Canfield handles a group of ATV riders reported for riding prohibited trails. Officer Holmes investigates a suspected illegal deer kill, and an abandoned car is found on the Androscoggin River that might be linked to a crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Manhunt
programme.desc: Officer Glen Lucas races to the scene of an ATV accident. When a home is broken into, Officers Bill Boudreau and Eric Hannett assist police in tracking the suspect. Officer Bob Mancini tries to save the life of an injured loon.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trail Blazers
programme.desc: A deer hunter pleads ignorance when caught with tree stands on private property. Officer Crouse catches a group of ATV speedsters, and Officer MacFazden investigates a suspicious bear kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Officer Canfield responds to a call about an orphaned bear cub. Sgt. Lucas pays an unexpected visit to a hunter suspected of illegal baiting. And Officer Cyrs investigates a large buck shot by a young, nervous hunter during muzzleloader season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Out of Options
programme.desc: Officer Cyrs gets a call about a rabid fox that attacked a homeowner. Officer Crouse tracks down a group of ATV riders. Lt. Murphy talks to a farmer about a nuisance bear. Officers Frye and Jones investigate a hunter that may have shot from the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trespassers Beware
programme.desc: In Texas, a new year brings new cadets and a rookie almost gets run down. In Beaumont, Game Warden Boone investigates an armed trespasser. Game Wardens encounter a Mexican boat on U.S. waters while looking for illegal gill nets on the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Don't Mess With Texas
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for an endangered Whooping Crane. A local beauty shop owner finds an injured baby hawk. Wardens respond to a call about a nuisance alligator and suspicions of a deer poacher arise.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wet and Wild

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deadly Conduct
programme.desc: Inman and Eddins assist on a manhunt when a suspect runs a constable off the road. An ordinary fishing check in Navarro County leads Amundson to illegal activity. In Jasper County, game wardens patrol an area after receiving trespassing complaints.

programme.desc: Bruce McArthur was many things; friend, grandfather, mall Santa, landscaper, and a ruthless serial killer who buried body parts in the yards of his posh clientele. The incredible true story of the race to catch Toronto's most prolific serial killer.

programme.desc: Through newly revealed interviews from Attica Correctional Facility, New York's most prolific serial killer, Joel Rifkin, reveals exclusive insights into the mind of a monster.

programme.title: Dateline: Noises in the Night

programme.title: Dateline: Finding Sarah Goode

programme.title: Dateline: Finding Sarah Goode

programme.title: Dateline: Before the Storm
programme.desc: A mother of two who vanishes during a storm turns out to be a victim of something sinister.

programme.title: Dateline: The Alibi
programme.desc: Private First Class Karlyn Ramirez had a job she loved and a baby she adored. Then, she was shot dead in her home. Her killer thought he'd covered his tracks, but investigators uncovered a plot so devious, it defied imagination.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Inside Man
programme.desc: A smooth convict was offered a deal as tempting as it was dangerous: get key information from a suspected serial killer to win your freedom. The catch; he'd have to go undercover in a psychiatric prison with no guarantee of getting out alive.

programme.title: In Defense Of: Ted Bundy

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Murder in the Heartland

programme.title: Mysteries & Scandals: Serial Killers of the ‘80s

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Charles Cullen
programme.desc: Nurse Charles Cullen is one of America's most prolific serial killers. Police say he may have murdered up to 400 victims, Cullen claimed he acted mercifully to end their pain. An in-depth look into the case reveals the truth behind his motives.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Kristen Gilbert

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Jennifer Shanbrom and Matt Fletcher

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Patricia Teeter & Steven Brown

programme.title: Catching a Serial Killer: Sam Little

programme.title: Mom: Soapy Eyes and a Clean Slate

programme.title: Mom: Free Therapy and a Dead Lady's Yard Sale
programme.desc: Family secrets come out when Christy and Bonnie are asked to join Violet's therapy session.

programme.title: Movie: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Former villain Gru reconnects with his long-lost and far more successful twin brother Dru for one last heist: stealing a diamond from another supervillain, former child star Balthazar Bratt who is obsessed with the character that he played in his youth.

programme.title: Movie: Minions
programme.desc: Years before lending their skills to Gru in 'Despicable Me,' the Minions are in need of a new villainous master to serve. In 1960s New York City, they find just what they're looking for: the world's first-ever female supervillain.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa vs. Malibu Stacey
programme.desc: Lisa creates a feminist doll and goes head-to-head with Malibu Stacey.

programme.title: The Simpsons: King-Size Homer
programme.desc: Homer tries everything to get out of the plant's new exercise program and discovers that being on disability would do just that. He sets out to gain 61 pounds in order to be able to work from home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 22 Short Films About Springfield
programme.desc: While Bart and Milhouse wonder if anything interesting ever happens in Springfield, various residents find themselves in unusual situations.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lard of the Dance
programme.desc: Homer greases up Bart with another one of his get-rich schemes; Lisa struggles at school.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Tree Hugger
programme.desc: Lisa tries to save Springfield's oldest Redwood by spending four days in the tree.

programme.title: The Simpsons: E. Pluribus Wiggum
programme.desc: When Quimby pushes up the town's election, Springfield becomes the first city in the nation to hold a presidential primary. Springfield's citizens are less than happy with the candidates, so they embrace a write-in instead: Ralph Wiggum.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Coming to Homerica
programme.desc: When Springfield receives an influx of unemployed workers from neighbouring Ogdenville, Mayor Quimby decides to close its borders and Homer sets up a border patrol group.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XX
programme.desc: Lisa is livid with Miss Hoover and, in a series of homages to classic Hitchcock stories, she sets out for deadly revenge. Krusty's fast-food sandwich transforms news anchor Kent Brockman into an enraged zombie. Also, Homer is impaled in Moe's tavern.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Spy Who Learned Me
programme.desc: Marge becomes upset when Homer blurts out embarrassing remarks throughout a movie. After Homer suffers a concussion on the job, he seeks help during his time off to learn how to become a better husband.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fatzcarraldo
programme.desc: When all the fast food restaurants in Springfield become healthy, Homer turns to the last bastion of greasy food for comfort and digs up some childhood memories along the way.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: The Best of Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: The most spectacular moments from Seven Worlds, One Planet series that highlights the incredibly rich and wonderful diversity of life found on our planets seven unique continents.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Best of Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Revisit the most memorable scenes from Blue Planet II's seven episodes. Highlights include giant trevally that fly out of the water to snatch seabirds in mid-air and the industrious tuskfish who uses a coral anvil to crack open his clams.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: Yellowstone freezes solid for six months each year. The severe winter is the greatest challenge facing the Park's animals, but for the wolf, it is the season of opportunity as they stalk ever-weakening prey.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As summer returns, a new challenge emerges: Yellowstone begins to dry out. Yellowstone cutthroat trout mass in shallow streams ready to spawn, but they make easy prey for otters and osprey.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Autumn
programme.desc: Autumn is Yellowstone's shortest season and a period of swift change. Conditions change from summer to winter in just two months, forcing animals to leave or prepare for winter.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Summer
programme.desc: The few short weeks of an Alaskan summer must sustain the abundant wildlife for the whole year. No season brings more surprises. There is a predictable wealth of riches, but there is so little time to master the art of survival.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Winter
programme.desc: The vast mountains, the surrounding oceans and the northerly latitude combine to deliver one of the most extreme winters on the planet.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Life Story: First Steps
programme.desc: Each and every animal is born with a chance to survive, thrive and produce their very own next generation. The first hurdle in life is infancy.

programme.title: Life Story: Growing Up
programme.desc: In the journey towards adulthood, a moment comes for all animals when they must strike out on their own.

programme.title: Life Story: Home
programme.desc: To survive, animals need somewhere to live, a place that provides the necessities of life, shelter from the elements and refuge from enemies.

programme.title: Life Story: Power
programme.desc: An individual's life journey interweaves with many others. Those who are successful know when to fight or back down, when to cooperate or to go it alone and how to manipulate and deceive.

programme.title: Life Story: Courtship
programme.desc: Competition to win a partner has created both the most extraordinary beauty and life-threatening violence found anywhere in nature. The stakes could not be higher: without a mate, the journey of life ends.

programme.title: Life Story: Parenthood
programme.desc: Raising offspring and continuing the line is the next best thing to immortality.

programme.title: Movie: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: An aspiring Navy pilot undergoes an emotional transformation during his time at boot camp.

programme.title: Movie: Pulp Fiction

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden Cities of the Maya

programme.title: What on Earth?: Fountain of Youth Found?
programme.desc: A strange structure shaped like a giant shark might point the way to a lost civilization's fountain of youth. A massive hurricane heads toward Florida, but something unexpected is in its eye.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Satan in Siberia
programme.desc: A satanic symbol points to an army of the dead in Siberia. A massive stone giant's in a remote desert. Evidence of a Russian doomsday device is right on America's doorstep. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.desc: When Detective Molly Daul works two homicides back to back, she realizes she's dealing with a sexual predator who targets trusting young women. Arrested before he can kill again in Seattle, his chilling confession remains with Molly to this day.

programme.title: Homicide City: Nine Months Murdered

programme.title: The Interrogator: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: A young mother is strangled to death in her bedroom while her young son sleeps. As Detective Fil Waters digs into the mystery, he soon learns the victim's own mother was murdered twenty-five years earlier.

programme.title: Diabolical: Daddy's Little Nightmare
programme.desc: In 2017, Federal Heights, Colorado is filled with fear when 69-year-old veteran Bill Mussack is reported missing gone without a trace. Police act fast to uncover a diabolical killer with a heinous plot, before this malicious murderer strikes again.

programme.title: The Serial Killer Among Us: Phillip Jablonski
programme.desc: When butchered bodies show up across California, investigators realize they're dealing with a depraved serial killer. With a kill list in hand, he's hunting for victims, keeping a macabre audio diary as he goes. No one knows where he is or if he'll stop.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Evil in South Texas
programme.desc: Billy Staton and his fiancé Leticia Castro vanish without a trace. Have they left town and eloped? The discovery of Billy's burnt out car and a shock confession, reveal a web of lies that only a secret recording can untangle the truth.

programme.title: The Serial Killer Among Us: Phillip Jablonski
programme.desc: When butchered bodies show up across California, investigators realize they're dealing with a depraved serial killer. With a kill list in hand, he's hunting for victims, keeping a macabre audio diary as he goes. No one knows where he is or if he'll stop.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Evil in South Texas
programme.desc: Billy Staton and his fiancé Leticia Castro vanish without a trace. Have they left town and eloped? The discovery of Billy's burnt out car and a shock confession, reveal a web of lies that only a secret recording can untangle the truth.

programme.title: Diabolical: Hands That Rob the Cradle

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Gone
programme.desc: In Stockton, California, 18-year old Jessyca Arro meets a dark fate. The twists and turns in the case keep this killer one step ahead until one last clue leads detectives to the mother lode.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The gruesome slaying of Debra Rawls left the town of Summerfield paralyzed in fear.

programme.title: Diabolical: Family or Foe

programme.title: Diabolical: Weeping Widow
programme.desc: After losing her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claims she's had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. But authorities soon realize she's a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Most Evil: Ranked: Jealous Killers
programme.desc: Profiles of six notorious killers led by jealousy or dangerous impulse.

programme.title: Most Evil: Ranked: Hedonistic Killers
programme.desc: Portraits of influential murderers who claimed to be spiritually led, and those who give in to their darkest impulses.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murder in the Wetlands

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Bizarre Love Triangle

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stalked
programme.desc: 26-year-old Florence Ballino is found dead in her apartment in an unusual condition. Her attacker deliberately left behind clues in an attempt to confuse investigators. Detective Postiglione identifies one clue that inextricably connects to the killer.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Murder in Monrovia
programme.desc: John and investigators follow the trail of a chilling 911 confession that leads them to dangerous Nimrod Guerrero. And when Frederick McCaskill leaves a survivor clinging to life, police and Cal work to make sure this criminal doesn't elude justice.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Lost Angel
programme.desc: Two distraught women call 911 when they discover their sister brutally murdered. Soon, detectives uncover a stunning surprise and struggle to find a killer whose self-hatred drove him to commit the ultimate sin, in a precedent-setting case.

programme.title: See No Evil: One Last Shot
programme.desc: A family's worst nightmare begins when 30-year-old Jennifer Krajnak is gunned down after a night out with friends at a bar in Lemon Grove, California. Investigators zero in on multiple suspects but it's surveillance footage that leads to her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Officer Down
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda is faced with his worst nightmare when he learns a friend and fellow officer, Mark Dabling, has been killed in the line of duty. Police conduct an all-out manhunt and discover the gunman is even more dangerous than they'd thought.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: Tammie Craycraft Smith, a 30-year-old recent divorcee, finds herself working two jobs to make ends meet. But Tammie's trusting nature and desire to be loved leave her vulnerable to deception, betrayal, and deadly consequences.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Fit for a King

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Miami
programme.desc: We are headed to Miami for a little fun in the sun and some truly epic eats. We're trying it all, from stone crabs at Joe's, to the lamb shank at Sardinia. The piping hot oven at Fratelli La Bufala is turning out pillowy calzones.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Life Changers
programme.desc: We're revealing all the unforgettable dishes that changed our lives.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Picture Perfect

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Chicago's Cutting Edge
programme.desc: Andrew explores the driving forces behind the cutting edge food scene in Chicago. From exotic ingredients to innovative techniques, food suppliers in the Windy City are pushing the limits.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Austin
programme.desc: The food in Austin can get a little weird but that's a compliment in a city where funky is part of the pioneer spirit.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Glasgow
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the culinary scene of Glasgow, Scotland, which is just as diverse as the city's landscape. From macaroni pies to venison haggis, the whimsical curiosity of the people is reflected in the iconic dishes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Big Island
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Hawaii's Big Island to take in its laid-back cuisine. From ancient traditions like lau lau and opakapaka fish to new traditions like the loco moco and huli chicken, he dives deep into the island's food culture.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bay Area
programme.desc: California's East Bay area is a thriving multi-ethnic community. Andrew Zimmern highlights the culinary hot spots where Chinese Dim Sum, Indian Pani Puri, American Soul food and Mexican tacos are being served up in traditional style.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the boardwalk indulgences of the Jersey Shore. From sticky-sweet saltwater taffy, to slices of tomato pie and Italian subs, the Jersey Shore's culinary scene is a carnival for the taste buds.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pups in the Wild/ The Sunshine Pups
programme.desc: The Pugs go on a mission to find a bear so Chloe and the Lil' Nature Scouts get their wild animal badge. After a week of rain ends, Bingo and Rolly organize a game in the sun.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Take Romeo Off the Road/Mission: PJ Seeker
programme.desc: The PJ Masks gets locked in the Lab and it's up to PJ Robot to rescue them! Gekko is on the case when animals keep disappearing from the city.

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Labour of Armadylan/ Lost in Space
programme.desc: Armadylan tries to fix a museum artifact without telling the PJ Masks. Romeo wants to create the ultimate trap for the PJ Masks.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Pirate Adventure
programme.desc: Mickey and pals are enjoying a day at the beach when Peg Leg Pete delivers a note from Goofy's long lost Grandpappy, Captain Goof-Beard, asking for the gang's help in ensuring that Harmony-Chord Island doesn't go out of tune and sink.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Suitcase Switcheroo / More Cowbell for Bob
programme.desc: When Bob mixes up his suitcase with another traveler, the pugs head to Spain on a mission to retrieve it. Then, Bob can't find his signature instrument for the reunion of his high school rock band.

programme.title: Bluey: Muffin Cone/ Circus/ Road Trip
programme.desc: Muffin has to wear a cone of shame! Bluey is the ringmaster in a game of circus! The Heelers go on a road trip!

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: The Thundermans: You've Got Fail
programme.desc: Max tries to win an epic fail video contest by submitting a fail video of Phoebe as she practices ballet. When Phoebe learns of his plan, she refuses to cooperate, and Max goes to desperate measures to get the footage he needs.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Doubles Trouble
programme.desc: Phoebe signs up for a tennis tournament in order to win a membership at Link's family's country club. She enlists Max to use his powers to help her, but when he gets a taste for the country club life, her plans go awry.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max Thunderman seem to be regular teenage twins, but they're in a family of superheroes. Phoebe strives to be normal and use her powers for good, but Max embraces the dark side. Can life ever be normal in this family?

programme.title: The Thundermans: Floral Support
programme.desc: Max uses Phoebe to help retrieve his chronicle of evil deeds from the school's confiscation closet, but goes too far in breaking her trust to pull off his plan.

programme.title: The Thundermans: The Neverfriending Story
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max worry they will be stuck hanging out together all the time when their friends start to spend time with each other. The twins go to great lengths to make sure that they all have a bad experience at the movies.

programme.title: The Thundermans: No Country for Old Mentors
programme.desc: Phoebe feels pressure to choose her dad over her favourite next-gen hero in the Superhero Mentor Program and soon regrets her decision once she sees his old and outdated techniques.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Superstition Strikes
programme.desc: Amelia thinks she’s cursed with bad luck and is reluctant to help the Rangers, afraid she’ll cause more harm. But when monsters attack the base, she learns the truth about luck.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Stego Search
programme.desc: The Warden takes away Javi’s keytar, putting him in a bad mood, which he refuses to explain to the team. Javi is forced to open up about his problems in order to find his Zord.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: An Udder Mess/ Teacher's Fret
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wins two tickets to Dairyland – but has to choose between her besties Sid and Lincoln for the day. / When Ronnie Anne finds out her dad is dating her teacher, she teams with Sid to break them up ASAP.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fool's Gold/ Flight Plan
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa’s gold./ Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl, Cj and Carlitos try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karma Chameleon/ Team Effort
programme.desc: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roughin' It/ The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Lincoln is worried that he's lost his manliness from growing up with all sisters, so he and Clyde go camping. Lincoln gets Lori a job at a pizza arcade, but when he starts to ask favors of her, Lori gets in hot water.

programme.title: The Loud House: Zach Attack/ Flying Solo
programme.desc: Eleven year old Lincoln Loud shows you how to survive the chaos of ten sisters.

programme.title: The Loud House: Attention Deficit/ Out on a Limo
programme.desc: Clyde's dads give Lincoln more attention than he gets at home. Lincoln wins a ride in a limo and starts to change after soaking up the good life.

programme.title: The Loud House: Silence of the Luans/ Undercover Mom
programme.desc: With Luan locked in a cell in the basement, who is responsible for the April Fool’s Day pranks this year?/ Mom goes undercover as a student at the high school and becomes BFFs with Leni, Luna and Luan.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandpappy the Pirate/ Cephalopod Lodge
programme.desc: With SpongeBob's help, Mr. Krab attempts to fool his granddad into thinking he's a pirate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Student Starfish/ Clams
programme.desc: Pat joins SpongeBob at boating school; Mr. Krabs takes Bob and Squid fishing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karate Island
programme.desc: SpongeBob receives an invitation to take part in a competition on mysterious Karate Island for the chance to be crowned 'King of Karate.'

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy IV/ Doing Time
programme.desc: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy are eating when Mermaid Man accidentally drops his belt.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boating Buddies/ Krabby Kronicle
programme.desc: Squidward is forced to attend Boating School with SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Curse of Bikini Bottom / Squidward in Clarinetland
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick disturb the Flying Dutchman's slumber and he turns them into ghosts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple Fever/ Chum Caverns
programme.desc: Squidward gets stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm. Plankton creates an underground restaurant that threatens to put the Krusty Krab out of business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tentacle-vision/ I Heart Dancing
programme.desc: Squidward gets a TV show. / SpongeBob has a dance audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide n' seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Super Shredder
programme.desc: For the first time, the Turtles encounter something they cannot defeat - the Super Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Power Inside Her
programme.desc: A concerned Donnie tests April to discover her psychic abilities are rapidly growing in power.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tokka vs. the World
programme.desc: Raph's bonding with little Chompy is interrupted by the invasion of Tokka, who has come to Earth searching for him.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tale of the Tiger Claw
programme.desc: A mysterious new enemy with superhuman speed is on the hunt for Tiger Claw, and will take out whoever stands in her way.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Darkest Plight
programme.desc: The Turtle team hunts for their Sensei, but soon realize they are being hunted as well.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Stego Search
programme.desc: The Warden takes away Javi’s keytar, putting him in a bad mood, which he refuses to explain to the team. Javi is forced to open up about his problems in order to find his Zord.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Danger Force: Say My Name
programme.desc: The members of Danger Force are given terrible nicknames live on KLVY news, so they come up with a plan to announce to the world who they really are - Volt, AWOL, ShoutOut, and Brainstorm.

programme.title: Drama Club: Luck Be a Poncho Tonight
programme.desc: After a string of bad luck, Mack decides to wear her lucky poncho to turn things around, but causes a rift between her and Oliver.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Texas Weiners/ YooHooTube
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger are tasked with driving to pick up 1,000 hot dogs for a birthday party. To save Schwoz from an experiment gone wrong, Captain Man and Kid Danger must follow instructions he posted online.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Sushi Sitter/ Cheer Beast
programme.desc: Captain Man must save Kid Danger from Drillfinger with the only tool he has: a motorized toilet.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Budget Cuts
programme.desc: When the Vice Mayor cuts Captain Man and Kid Danger's budget to build a high-speed railway in Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must figure out creative ways to save money.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry's Frittle Problem
programme.desc: When Henry's dad gets an offer for a new job in Bordertown, Henry and Ray go undercover to try and stop Henry's dad from getting the job and prevent Henry from having to move.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Toon in for Danger
programme.desc: When Henry and Ray get a copy of the new Kid Danger and Captain Man cartoon and see that it's horrible, they must hurry to fix the cartoon before the big premiere party.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Spelling Bee Hard
programme.desc: Dr. Minyak challenges Captain Man to a Spelling Bee.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Rock Box Dump
programme.desc: When a report comes out that Kid Danger's super power is actually an illness, Kid Danger has to convince Swellview that it is a huge misunderstanding.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Rubber Duck
programme.desc: When Ray accidentally destroys Henry's dad's prized remote-control car, they throw a manicure party to raise money to fix it.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry Hart lands a part-time job as Kid Danger, a superhero sidekick in training.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry Hart lands a part-time job as Kid Danger, a superhero sidekick in training.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Beak
programme.desc: A Super Villain challenges Phineas and Ferb after mistaking them for super heroes.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: My Fair Dolly / Flea-Maggedon
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Secret(s) of Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: On a family trip to Scrooge's ancestral castle, Dewey tries to hide the truth about his mom as his brothers search for family secrets.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mayor for a Day/The Dog Craze of Summer
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Parker Plays: And I'm Shelby...
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Monster of Phineas-n-Ferbenstein/ Oil on Candace
programme.desc: Boys set off to Central America to help a Damsel in Distress Isabella.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas' Birthday Clip-O-Rama!
programme.desc: It's Phineas' birthday and Ferb puts together a clip show of the gang's favourite moments. Meanwhile, Agent P must stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from using his 'non-inator' to pre-empt his brothers' biography from appearing on television.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 1
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 2: Escape From Reality
programme.desc: Dipper, Soos, and Wendy must save Mabel from a strange new world, while Bill's forces plan their next move.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: The Owl House: Wing It Like Witches
programme.desc: Not your average underdog story.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Max
programme.desc: Hiro invents a tiny robot, Mini-Max, to supervise and be a sidekick to Fred while the rest of the team is in class.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Maximum Trouble
programme.desc: When Fred runs into a string of bad luck, Megan reveals to Hiro that she's trying to uncover the true identities of Big Hero 6 for her school's newspaper.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Bring on the Bad Guys: Part One

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Bring on the Bad Guys: Part Two
programme.desc: While Anya steps up to embrace being the Spider-Girl, Spider-Man enters Mysterio's funhouse and learns that there's a bounty on his head.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Bring on the Bad Guys: Part Three

programme.desc: Arizona seeks Mark's advice as she tries to reconcile with Callie, who has big news of her own. Meanwhile, Teddy must make a key decision for Henry during his surgery, and the Chief announces he is looking for a new Chief Resident.

programme.title: The Closer: Four to Eight
programme.desc: When two Catorce gang members are shot to death, Brenda and her squad must solve the case.

programme.title: The Closer: Manhunt
programme.desc: It looks to be the return of a serial killer when two bodies turn up dead. With the knowledge that he kills in sets of three, Chief Pope charges Brenda and her squad to hunt down the killer before a third victim is taken.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Jailbait
programme.desc: When a newly released prisoner misses two back-to-back parole meetings, the squad is called in to track him down. Meanwhile, Sharon invites a therapist to the office to evaluate Rusty over a game of chess.

programme.title: Major Crimes: All In
programme.desc: When a body turns up at a posh country club in a quite neighbourhood, the squad's investigation leads them down a money trail full of surprises. Meanwhile, Flynn is noticeably distracted on the job and Rusty questions Emma's intentions.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Curve Ball
programme.desc: Christmas vacation is interrupted for the division when a baseball scout is found dead in his RV. The squad works through the murder case, unfolding a complicated kidnapping scheme.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Risk Assessment
programme.desc: When a well-off graduate student gets shot to death in a gang-riddled neighbourhood, the division must work with the FBI to find his killer.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Year-End Blowout
programme.desc: A year-end-blowout sale becomes literal for a used car lot after one of its owners is killed when a bomb explodes. While the squad tries to find who is responsible, Rusty attempts to catch the person threatening his and Sharon's life.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Missing Women (Part 1)
programme.desc: When in 1999, young women mysteriously disappear from Yosemite National Park, investigators determine foul play and a prime suspect emerges, then escapes.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Evil Side (Part 2)
programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 1)
programme.desc: During a terrifying three-day period in late August 1990, five college students were found brutally murdered in Gainesville, Florida.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 2)
programme.desc: After five murders it would take investigators months - and the discovery of a campsite, a screwdriver and an audio tape - before they identified who the serial killer was.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Dartmouth Murders: Evil in a Small Town
programme.desc: Well known and liked Dartmouth College professors Half and Suzanne Zantop’s incredible lives came to a shocking end: found brutally murdered in their home. With few leads and clues investigators were stumped.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: The Secret They Couldn’t Talk About Part 1
programme.desc: Susan Powell, a 28-year-old mother of two, goes missing in December of 2009. The mystery deepens as more details about her marriage to husband Josh and their life behind closed doors emerge.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: What the Children Saw Part 2
programme.desc: Authorities search for missing mother of two, Susan Powell, in every nook and cranny of the desert in Western Utah while her friends and family wait for a break in the case.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Dartmouth Murders: Evil in a Small Town
programme.desc: Well known and liked Dartmouth College professors Half and Suzanne Zantop’s incredible lives came to a shocking end: found brutally murdered in their home. With few leads and clues investigators were stumped.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.desc: Dropped onto a frozen Alaskan glacier, all-star survivalists Laura Zerra and Steven Hall scramble to stave off frostbite and hypothermia. Later, 7,000 miles south, two new survivalists take on a sun-scorched Brazil island, with anaconda and stingray.

programme.desc: When Chuck finds himself with a hangover, Mike Rowe has a cure that has roots in a geophysical contracting company and a 19th-Century carriage maker.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Beware the Bayou
programme.desc: Billy Berger and Ky Furneaux are dropped in it up to their necks as they have to survive 21 days in the Louisiana swamp. They are washed out of their shelter by storms, must battle deadly snakes and avoid hungry alligators.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Diesel Defender
programme.desc: Major league pitcher Jacob deGrom needs his OBS Ford revamped. The guys convert a British Land Rover defender from right hand drive to left hand drive.
