programme.desc: They guys convert a Land Rover Defender from right hand to left hand drive for their lawyer. Heavy D parts out a military airplane de-icer.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Story of Street Outlaws
programme.desc: The Street Outlaws go in depth into how the show began and talk about what happened when producers came to Oklahoma for the very first time. They talk about their favorite moments from the show, and about how Street Outlaws has changed them.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days Comes to OKC
programme.desc: Thirty-two of the fastest racers from around the country gather in OKC for the biggest street race of the year Cash Days. And, with $50,000 on the line, all the racers are prepared to push their cars to the limit to try and win it all.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: A $50,000 Weekend
programme.desc: After round one of Cash Days in OKC, sixteen drivers are left to compete for the grand prize of $50,000, and the 405 is proud that half of them are OKC racers. But, the street proves to be slick, it's not clear that the risks outweighs the reward.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days: Another Brick in the Wall

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days: Comfortably Numb
programme.desc: On the second night of Cash Days, 405 racers must match up and race, while still fighting to knock out the only remaining Texas driver. The sketchy road is still in play, and it becomes a tuner's game to see who can get down the street in one piece.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: New Rules, New Road
programme.desc: The Daily Driver field is down to 18. With a new set of rules and a new road to race on, competition gets crazy. But only one driver will take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Dawn of America's List

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Cold Dark Road

programme.title: Storage Wars: Operation: Intimidation

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Return of the King of Montebello

programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Andy Richter
programme.desc: Andy Richter challenges the chefs to recreate the delectable fish and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Charlotte McKinney
programme.desc: The chefs recreate Charlotte McKinney's favorite all-natural burger. They'll have to use their imagination no stick the landing.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Tacos with Guy Episode
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Steak and Potatoes Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Learn what has become a signature part of Q's wardrobe and who among the Jokers is considered the best dancer. Plus, find out which character made his first appearance on an early episode of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Wait, My Chair!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Soliciting Statue
programme.desc: At an antique store, Michael shows off an impossible way to organize your clothes, and back at the supermarket we find out that there are some serious surprises lurking in our favorite foods.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Snow Way Out

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr try to warm up to strangers at a ski lodge and pull up a chair as uninvited guests at an Italian restaurant. And tonight’s punishment takes the cake when the loser is the surprise entertainer at the wrong party.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: This Is Not An Orange

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: In Case What?

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Perfect Stormi

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Kardashians Take Japan
programme.desc: Kim scrambles to shoot an entire Yeezy season seven campaign while in Japan, but worries that her sisters' questionable fashion sense might jeopardize the debut of the line.

programme.desc: The Kardashians take on the Jacksons in a charity softball game. Meanwhile, Kris pools her resources to renovate the Watts Empowerment Center, and Khloé and Scott devise a clever plan to reveal Art Vandelay's true identity.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Lord and His Lady
programme.desc: Inspired by the March for Our Lives demonstration, Kim meets with the survivors of the Parkland shooting to learn about their movement. Meanwhile, Scott revives his podcast with Khloé in Cleveland, and Kylie feels insecure about her post-baby body.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Betrayal
programme.desc: Khloé is blindsided by some devastating news about her relationship just days before her due date. Meanwhile, Kim worries that Khloe's delivery will fall on the day of her high school reunion, and Scott and Kendall team up to do some extreme sports.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: True Story

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: 50 Shades of Faye
programme.desc: Nanny Faye joins the world of online dating. When Todd gets wind of it, he makes himself her chaperone. Meanwhile, new homeowners Chase and Savannah compete for Todd's handouts to furnish their homes.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Client-Hell
programme.desc: Savannah agrees to manage Todd's singing career for a school project and unwittingly unleashes his inner diva. Meanwhile, Chase struggles to throw a dinner for the family to prove he can outdo Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Bunions, Bulldogs and Hedgehogs, Oh My!

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Market Crash
programme.desc: Chase accepts Todd's Challenge to market the juice bar, but quickly realizes that selling juice is hard. Meanwhile, Todd and Julie fret about Savannah, who's convalescing at the family home after a bad car wreck.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mannequin Challenge
programme.desc: Savannah struggles with a project for her clothing line. Chase gets an ultimatum from Todd about getting Lilo's behaviour under control.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: O Grayson, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: Todd and Julie's plans for a peaceful weekend go awry. Chase tries to spend some bonding time with Grayson, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Matchmakers and Batchbakers
programme.desc: Todd and Julie try to find Savannah the perfect match when she jumps back into the dating pool. Meanwhile, Grayson enters a baking contest.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dancing Tween
programme.desc: Grayson is invited to his first dance and Todd and Julie are conflicted about him growing up. Meanwhile, Todd puts Savannah's and Nanny Faye's driving skills to the test in Savannah's new ride.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Moms Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: When Todd refuses to celebrate anyone but Faye for Mother's Day, Julie and Lindsie make their own plans. Todd is forced to babysit Jackson but struggles with Lindsie's new age parenting.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Code

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Test

programme.desc: Game Wardens Mallory Mitchell and Jeremy Lindsey intervene when an overloaded boat and unruly jet skiers put lives at risk. Game Warden Randolph McGee investigates reports of a wild hog being tortured, while other game wardens round up a willy alligator.

programme.desc: Game Wardens Mike Boone and James Noxon question a felon suspected of illegally hunting with a firearm. Hunters are tracked down and interrogated after a suspicious sighting on private property, and a late-night shrimp boat search uncovers illegal fish.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Marshland Massacre
programme.desc: A slew of poached birds is discovered on an abandoned boat, changing a missing person's search into a hunt for a hiding poacher. Game Wardens Mike Boone and Lauren Iles rescue a tangled 12-foot gator, while multiple boats are inspected on Lake Limestone.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunter Games

programme.desc: A slew of poached birds is discovered on an abandoned boat, changing a missing person's search into a hunt for a hiding poacher. Game Wardens Mike Boone and Lauren Iles rescue a tangled 12-foot gator, while multiple boats are inspected on Lake Limestone.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Don't Mess With Texas
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for an endangered Whooping Crane. A local beauty shop owner finds an injured baby hawk. Wardens respond to a call about a nuisance alligator and suspicions of a deer poacher arise.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Island of Time

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Welcome to Our World

programme.desc: The Parthenon is the crowning jewel of ancient Greek architecture and it was engineered according to a mysterious mathematical formula; expert builders examine the secrets of its design and investigate if modern-day methods could rebuilt it.

programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Rise of a Superpower

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the mystery of what happened to the ancient superpower that once thrived in the Amazon jungles, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts are hot on the trail of the perpetrators that caused this civilization to fall.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: American Stonehenge
programme.desc: Investigating the mysterious pattern of rocks at the bottom of Lake Michigan known as Underwater Stonehenge. At the notorious Alcatraz prison, Rob uses state-of-the-art technology in search of rumored escape tunnels.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Doomsday Volcano Mystery
programme.desc: A massive supervolcano beneath Naples, Italy may be on the verge of erupting again; Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns investigate this disturbing new evidence.

programme.desc: Rob Nelson heads to California to investigate a network for major fault lines that could set off an unprecedented mega-quake. Then, he explores a mysterious sinkhole that some believe is an endless pit to the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Legend of the Nazi Gold
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures
programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Secret History of the New World
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Was a Good Man to Me

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: discovery+ Sneak Peek: The Girl in the Photo

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Don't Know Why He Spared Me
programme.desc: Thirty years on, Sharon Morris still wonders why former boyfriend Tony Fiebiger didn't kill her when he had the chance. There was a time when she felt only love for Tony, but as his sick crimes are revealed, she's grateful she's alive to talk about it.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Complicated Relationship

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover Makes Three
programme.desc: Sometimes the love of one person isn't satisfying.

programme.desc: A beloved mother of four disappears just days after her stepdaughter vanished. Police must investigate to find out if their complicated relationship led to tragedy.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Without Mercy

programme.title: Disappeared: Road to Nowhere
programme.desc: College student Bryce Laspisa is driving to visit his parents, but something mysterious is troubling him. When his car is found crashed and abandoned in a remote California park, investigators and his family try to make sense of Bryce's baffling behavior.

programme.title: Disappeared: Girl Interrupted

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: A God-Fearing Woman

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Amish Serial Killer
programme.desc: When the body of a 9-year-old boy is found by the side of a rural highway it takes police two years to identify him. The mystery leads police on a chilling odyssey into a secretive community and hot on the trail of an Amish serial killer.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Absent Father

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Butcher of Buffalo
programme.desc: Mother of three Joan Giambra is discovered strangled, lying naked under her comatose 11-year old daughter. The young girl becomes the only hope of catching a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A housewife in an exclusive neighborhood in Long Beach, California is murdered in broad daylight while cops surround her home. The suspected killer claims it was a burglary gone wrong, but detectives discover something more sinister.

programme.title: Dateline: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A housewife in an exclusive neighborhood in Long Beach, California is murdered in broad daylight while cops surround her home. The suspected killer claims it was a burglary gone wrong, but detectives discover something more sinister.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Prey on Tourists

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade: The Dixieland Murders
programme.desc: In 1987, two of Biloxi, Mississippi's most prominent citizens, Judge Vincent Sherry and his wife, Margaret, a city councilwoman, are shot to death in their home. Their oldest daughter sets out on a decade-long quest to find her parents' killer.

programme.title: Killer Carnies: The Sideshow Murders
programme.desc: A brutal murder sent shock waves through the carnival community, and every performer is a suspect. But with the death of Lobster Boy, truths will be revealed, and a reign of terror will meet a shocking end. Life at the carnival will forever change.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Handsome Devil
programme.desc: Kenia Monge spends her week days studying and her weekends partying with friends. When she disappears from a downtown Denver nightclub after a night of drinking and dancing, Kenia wanders the streets without purse or phone and encounters a man with a van.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Leaders
programme.desc: From Winston Churchill and Adolf Hitler, to Mao Tse Tung and Saddam Hussein, experts investigate what makes or breaks a war leader.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: Tank Battles of Korea
programme.desc: In 1950 the world is caught off guard as North Korea launches a massive armoured assault into South Korea. This is the story of the American tankers who rush to the aid of the South and the bloody battles they fight up and down the Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Revamp on the Outer Banks

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Two Businesses
programme.desc: While Mark Bowe is on the road looking for hand-made crafts to sell in his other store, Sherman leads the crew building a log cabin kitchen near Alexandria. Things get wild as Mark carves a 10,000-year old mammoth tusk for Sherman.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hillbilly Lemonade
programme.desc: The guys must get creative to make something worthwhile from a lackluster cabin. Later, Mark visits an incredible finished cabin made from logs he salvaged on the first season of the show.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Baltimore Fireboat
programme.desc: After a call from their old friend, Captain Tim, the crew travels to Norfolk, Virginia, to salvage a fireboat from Baltimore. When they return to the shop, Mike and Tay enlist the help of a local coppersmith to fashion unique foot baths for Hotel Roanoke.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bugs, Birds and Bad Plumbing
programme.desc: Moving to the interior of the Dollar House, host and interior designer Nicole Curtis demolishes her heart out and focuses on the disgusting kitchen space as well as adding a half bathroom to the first floor, evicting a few pigeons along the way.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Rebuild
programme.desc: Heading up to the second floor, Nicole takes on the bathroom, one of the house's dirtiest and grimiest rooms. She brings it down to the studs, adding clean lines with white subway tile and re-purposes an old dresser into one of her signature vanities.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Salvaged Back Yard
programme.desc: Moving back outside, Nicole begins to clean up all the debris from the yard and comes up with a plan to use salvaged materials from the house to create a cute little back yard area.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Breaking the Woodwork Rules
programme.desc: Nicole begins work on the interior of the Case Ave house and is faced with a living and dining room full of gorgeous woodwork and original pocket doors that have been painted over the years.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Breakthrough
programme.desc: The Case Ave house is almost complete, and Nicole has saved the most difficult task for last - figuring out a functional layout for the cramped kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite Remade
programme.desc: Nicole tries to figure out a way to incorporate the old kitchen pantry into a new master bathroom and has to deal with outdated and out of order parts.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Back Yard on a Budget
programme.desc: Nicole doesn't have much to work with in the back yard, but she's making the best with what she's got. Lifting up the garage to pour a new foundation beats the cost of building a new one from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Scrap Wood Basement
programme.desc: Nicole takes on a basement restoration in order to help out a sick friend and does her best to use as much scrap wood and materials as she possible can.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Exterior Miracles
programme.desc: Tired of the house being an eyesore in the neighborhood, Nicole must remove all the debris left over from demolishing the burnt out house on the lot next door.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: From Charred to Charming
programme.desc: In the home stretch on her project in Detroit, Nicole must finish up the upper apartment which is the area the fire damaged the most. The community comes together to build an urban garden.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, Connecticut
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to Mystic, Conn., to conquer land and sea with a totally bonkers, Portuguese-inspired burger and a crazy coastal feast of chowder.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland (Maine)
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits the land of lighthouses and lobsters: Portland, ME. His main event awaits him at the Tradewinds Café where he'll take on the Manimal Challenge.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Festival of Fries
programme.desc: Everyone's favorite side dish takes center stage as Noah Cappe celebrates over-the-top fries loaded with every topping you could imagine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Aporkalypse Now
programme.desc: Noah visits the Great American Foodie Fest in Las Vegas and the Topfield Fair in Massachusetts.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There's Something About Cherry
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in Macon, Georgia, for the International Cherry Blossom Festival and some of the prettiest, pinkest carnival treats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Attack of the Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Kentucky State Fair and gets a satisfying taste of all things Southern. He starts off with the Mac Ball Burger featuring deep-fried homemade mac and cheese.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Six Degrees of Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes hog-wild with fantastic porky delights. Pork is as delicious as it is versatile, which allows these amazing carnival cooks to get creative. Whether it's grilled, smoked or even incorporated into dessert, it's time to pig out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Super Sundaes
programme.desc: We all scream for ice cream, but when it comes to super sundaes, these carnival concessionaires have gone one step beyond, and host Noah Cappe is here to try them all!

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: By the Sea
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the best seafood by the seashore. Whether it's baked, broiled, fried or served in a shell or on a bun, these fresh-out-of-the-water wonders have hungry diners wishing they were seeing waves.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Southern Staples
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson knows that you just can't beat authentic Southern cooking. Whether it's hearty and savory breakfasts, traditional and delicious low-country cuisine or sweet desserts, it’s a full day of your favorite Southern staples.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Yummy in the Middle
programme.desc: It's that ooey-gooey goodness in the middle that we just can't get enough of, so we're heading straight to the middle of things to see what greatness awaits. Jeff Mauro indulges in a 100-layer vanilla creme doughnut that's full of surprises.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: It's All About Auburn
programme.desc: Rutledge Wood and Damaris Philips visit Auburn, Alabama, known for its cuisine that uses classic Southern ingredients in inventive ways.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Bring It On, Birmingham!
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood are sold on Birmingham, Alabama's, Southern hospitality and amazing eats! At the charming 1950s hot dog shop Gus's Hot Dogs, the duo feasts on a spicy wiener packed with decidedly Southern flavors and spices.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch That Does a Body Good
programme.desc: As a chef constantly surrounded by food, it's important for Bobby to keep healthy options in mind... even when it comes to brunch! Bobby's fitness-minded menu is filled with some of his favourite ingredients.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch Americain
programme.desc: Bobby Flay takes some All-American dishes and gives them a makeover for brunch.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Weekend Staycation
programme.desc: A weekend staycation brunch at Chef Bobby Flay's home! Bobby's kitchen is the destination for a cozy menu of crunchy maple topped oatmeal, avocado salmon benedict, cinnamon sugar mini pancake muffins.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocoholic Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is covering the kitchen in chocolate for a luscious menu of sweet and savory treats like dark chocolate waffles with white chocolate custard sauce and espresso-chocolate whipped cream.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Mountains Of Meat
programme.desc: Michael Symon meets a chef bringing the Indian street food flavors of his childhood to Asheville, N.C., with his own take on a sloppy joe that he calls a Sloppy Jai, with lamb hash and 30 Indian spices.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brunchtime BBQ
programme.desc: In Charleston, S.C., Michael Symon smokes a whole hog and makes chorizo from scratch for a saucy BBQ brunch burrito with two different fire-roasted salsas. In Atlanta, an authentic Caribbean roasted pork sandwich has a dedicated local following.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Smorgasbord For A Shark's Appetite
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon finds a food truck serving up two can't-miss creations: cheeseburger tacos with a house-made beer cheese sauce and a Jamaican jerk fried fish taco with mango salsa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Slammin' Hot and Smoky
programme.desc: In Asheville, N.C., Michael Symon digs into a slammin' sandwich with three different cuts of pork smothered in triple-cheese sauce.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meadowlands State Fair/ Gardendale Magnolia Festival
programme.desc: Noah Cappe samples the freak show food of New Jersey and tries southern sweep potato pie ice cream.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California State Fair/ Northeast State Fair
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chows down on a lobster corn dog in California, and tries a deep fried peanut butter and banana sandwich in Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Stanislaus County Fair/ Texas Crab Fest
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Stanislaus County Fair in Turlock, California. He gets his paws into homemade fries topped with lobster claws and tail meat, and devours a delicious donut ice cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hogs and Dogs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe sets sail for The Great Frederick Fair in Maryland, where he goes all in for The Whole Hog, finds his sea legs with The Crabby Dog, rounds out his plate with Cake-a-Dilla and dances for joy with the Hula Boat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fusion Fiesta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lifts the lid on the American melting pot to reveal some decadent, delicious results. When fair goers meet fusion foods, the results can only be world domination.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Some Like It Popped
programme.desc: Noah hits the Big Butler Fair in Prospect, PA., where he tears into the Conevore, filled to the brim with smoked brisket, pork and chicken.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sizzling Southwest
programme.desc: Enchiladas, burritos, fajitas, ole! We're counting them down one by one, culminating in a Tex Mex Treat so stupendous, it's coming in at number one on the countdown.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: I, Breakfast Bot/ Dynamic Do-Over

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Off to See the Wizard
programme.desc: Brendar and Evan travel to Horus’ castle, where the wizard hires her to defeat the evil witch who turned his daughter into an owl. Brendar chooses Axe as her payment, while Evan has to prove he’s worthy of going with the group on the quest.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Ghoul Fools
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get caught in the feud between a crew of ghost pirates and the Flying Dutchman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Buried in Time/ Enchanted Tiki Dream
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a dream world for Squidward; The gang is caught in a time capsule.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mooncation/ Mr. Krabs Takes a Vacation
programme.desc: SpongeBob house-sits for Sandy, and all is quiet until Patrick shows up. After losing their passes, SpongeBob and Squidward try to sneak backstage at the sold-out Kelpy G show.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Fish in Town/ Love That Squid
programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in and becomes Squidward’s best friend.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman Begins/ Plankton's Good Eye
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick learn the secret origins of Mermaid Man and Branacle Boy from the heroes themselves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SquarePants Family Vacation
programme.desc: While on a family road trip to the Great Barrier Reef, SpongeBob and Patrick get lost and end up on the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidward's School for Grown Ups/ Oral Report
programme.desc: When Pat suddenly grows a very grown-up beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up, too.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Are You Happy Now?

programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutmare/ Bulletin Board
programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba, Spot, has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lincoln Loud: Girl Guru/ Come Sale Away

programme.title: The Loud House: Suite and Sour/ Back in Black

programme.title: The Loud House: House of Lies/ Game Boys

programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Are You My Mummy?/ Flop Starz

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: Young Blood, Old Souls
programme.desc: Luz's skills as a witch are put to the test when she attempts the impossible.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mr. Sparkles Loses His Sparkle

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Aunt Cass Goes Out

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mewberty/ Pixtopia
programme.desc: Marco and his friends run up Star’s Magic Mirror bill with prank phone calls, so they all travel to a dimension of pixies to pay it off. Star starts sprouting hearts all over her body, the telltale sign of Mewberty.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Interdimensional Field Trip/ Marco Grows a Beard
programme.desc: Star leads a class field trip to a museum in another dimension and puts the entire class in danger. Then, when Star flubs the spell used to help Marco grow a beard, the beard grows out of control and engulfs the house.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Diaz Family Vacation/ Brittney's Party
programme.desc: After inviting the Diaz's on a trip to Mewni as a last minute anniversary present, Star and Marco must save them from a many-headed serpent. Star must fight off Ludo and his army of monsters when they crash Brittney Wong's birthday party.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mr. Candle Cares/ Red Belt
programme.desc: Star rebels after the school guidance counselor, Mr. Candle, insists that her future is set in stone. Then, Marco finally decides to focus on earning his red belt in karate.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Star vs. Echo Creek/ Wand to Wand
programme.desc: Star goes into hiding after accidentally destroying a car. Later, Star and Ludo struggle to learn how to use their new wands properly.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble

programme.desc: When falling boxes trap Murray in the garage, he demands that Beverly get rid of everything except for one trunk. When the trunk goes missing, Murray becomes sentimental about what was inside while Erica has trouble parting with her stuff.

programme.title: Mom: Bert and Ernie and a Blessing of the People
programme.desc: After Bonnie and Adam attend a traditional wedding, they discover they're not on the same page about their own wedding. Also, Christy and Patrick have trouble setting the mood for their 'first time.'

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Parenting Bud
programme.desc: After Mike notices a bump on Bud's head, Bud explains that he was jumped the other night while unloading his truck at the pot shop. Later, Vanessa talks with the girls about their responsibility to care for her and Mike when they reach a certain age.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: April, Come She Will
programme.desc: When Vanessa's mooching sister April comes to visit, Mike suspects it's because she needs money. Sure enough, April explains that she's decided to have a baby, but doesn't have the funds for a donor egg.

programme.title: Mom: A Catheter and a Dipsy-Doodle
programme.desc: Despite being extremely ill, Christy insists on taking her final exams. Also, Bonnie is furious when she suspects her boyfriend is cheating on her.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Zimbabwe: Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: In Hwange National Park, Jack tracks lions and learns about their social structure, and then searches for the rare and endangered African wild dog. Then, Jack gets a unique view of Victoria Falls from the Devil's Pool.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Gabon's Primates
programme.desc: In Gabon, Jack meets conservationists to learn about the future of primates.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Jack's Zoo Adventures
programme.desc: Jack goes behind-the-scenes at some of his favourite zoos around the world. He takes us to Singapore Zoo, Healesville Sanctuary, Calgary Zoo, and Columbus Zoo.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Time for a Clambake
programme.desc: Windows are installed with a custom copper pan for flashing, Kevin visits the University of Florida's Hurricane Research Lab to feel what it's like to stand in a category three hurricane and at the end of the day, it's time for a clambake on the beach.

programme.title: Best Friends Furever With Kel Mitchell: The Don-'key' to Friendship
programme.desc: Opposites attract when a miniature donkey looks up to his large camel companion. Plus, an unexpected bond forms between a Weimaraner and a guinea pig.

programme.title: Tails of Valor: Paws for Applause
programme.desc: A border collie waits at her handler’s beck and call while providing her with comfort and stability. Plus, a Labrador makes the transition from household pet to service animal look easy when he connects with his new handler.

programme.title: House Smarts
programme.desc: Home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides some serious home improvement tips.

programme.title: Raw Travel: Ethiopia: One More Thing
programme.desc: A few of our favourite things about visiting Ethiopia are the ancient tribal traditions, feeding hyenas, and eating authentic Ethiopian cuisine.

programme.title: Wipeout: Newlyweds: Love and Other Wipeouts
programme.desc: Twelve teams of just-married couples will rock the 'Cradle of Love' before making memories in 'Honeymoon in Paree.'

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Cocktails and Calamine
programme.desc: Molly is nervous about Mike attending a celebratory party her publisher puts on for her and Peggy.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Prank Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Hilarious pranks are played on unsuspecting people and the results are caught on tape.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Dam Good Time
programme.desc: Rick negotiates the sale of a cigar box once belonging to JFK. A Civil War era photograph of General Custer arrives in the shop, but its authenticity is called into question.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chumlee's Last Laugh
programme.desc: Rick and Corey check out a massive Dukes of Hazzard toy collection. Then, time flies when a pocket watch engraved with Henry Ford II's signature lands in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: In the Doghouse
programme.desc: Storm the beaches with the Pawn Stars when hand drawn maps from the Normandy invasion hit the shop. Then, Rick reigns in a coin featuring the likeness of Roman Emperor Caligula.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick, Rock, and Roll
programme.desc: Two first editions of 'A Christmas Carol' appear in the shop and Corey must decide if he'll cough up the cash. Then, Rick gets rocked when a meteorite drops in. Later, Chumlee plans a night of bowling with the guys.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Can You Feel My Finger?
programme.desc: After Charlie has yet another pregnancy scare, Alan suggests he get a vasectomy. Charlie's doctor recommends freezing some sperm in case he changes his mind about having children, but things don't go quite as planned.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Whipped Unto the Third Generation
programme.desc: When Charlie's fiancée, Chelsea, convinces him to let Melissa, Alan's girlfriend, move in, the girls take over the house.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Princess Leia Fantasy
programme.desc: Ross and Chandler try to have the same open friendship that Phoebe and Rachel have.

programme.title: Kung Fu: Pilot
programme.desc: When a young Chinese-American woman journeys to an isolated monastery in China and returns home to find her town overrun with crime and corruption, she uses her martial arts skills to fight for justice, and searches for an assassin.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Cuffs
programme.desc: Chandler has a sexy encounter with Rachel's boss which leaves him in a predicament. Rachel is torn knowing she will put her job at risks if she helps him out.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ballroom Dancing
programme.desc: Joey teaches the landlord to ballroom dance to keep Monica and Rachel from being evicted.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Doctor Has a Cow Puppet
programme.desc: Alan finally succumbs to Judith's demand that he take Jake to therapy and realizes he has been sleepwalking. After Evelyn tells Charlie that Alan used to sleepwalk as a child, Charlie believes he has a solution.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Just Like Buffalo
programme.desc: When Jake imitates one of Charlie's sexist remarks, Judith's support group decides that Charlie's home is an unfit environment for the child. Charlie is forced to cajole the group into letting Jake continue to spend the weekends at his place.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Snow Laughing Matter
programme.desc: A weathercast is interrupted by a rogue camera, a pig takes a bite out of a swimsuit model’s rump roast, and a camel tries to squeeze himself into a tourist’s compact car with them still in it.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: It's Snow Big Deal
programme.desc: A male ballet dancer takes one to the nutcracker, a meteorologist catches a nasty bug in his mouth, and a beautiful woman dances, but only her pants do the splits.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior: Cincinnati City Qualifiers
programme.desc: 'American Ninja Warrior' heads to Cincinnati for the final City Qualifying Round. Competitors will face up to six challenging obstacles including Sling Shot which is new to the course this year.

programme.title: Wipeout: Winter Wipeout: This Little Piggy Went to Wipeout
programme.desc: This week's obstacles include 'The Hockey-Hottie,' 'Ripped Rhino,' 'Mr. Grinch,' 'Snowplow Sweeper' and the 'Wipeout Ski Lift.' In the end, only three will be left standing to earn a spot in the winter Wipeout Zone.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Dr. Robert Jeffress spreads the good news of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: In Search Ministries
programme.desc: Every worldview involves faith in some form; a commitment to applying reason and evidence to our search for ultimate answers to life's big questions.

programme.desc: As the Sadie Hawkins dance approaches, Erica asks Beverly to help her find Barry a date to keep him away from Lainey. But Beverly comes up with a girl that shocks everyone. Meanwhile, Adam gets into a fight with his best friend, Pops.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Cowboy Country
programme.desc: When Adam passes on a family ring to convey his feelings for Dana, Beverly can't seem to accept her little boy having such deep feelings at his age. Meanwhile, new couple Lainey and Barry convince Murray to watch football with Lainey's dad.

programme.title: Remarkable Women
programme.desc: Meet the six finalists for Nexstar's Remarkable Woman of the Year contest. They include a nurse, an ex-inmate dedicated to second chances, a three-time cancer survivor and a mental health advocate. Find out which of these deserving heroes takes the title.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mudlick or Bust
programme.desc: Molly surprises Peggy by reuniting her with her estranged sister, Rosemary, when they take a road trip to Peggy's hometown of Mudlick. Also, Vince and Mike experience father-son bonding when they work together to fix a water heater.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Tattoo
programme.desc: Vanessa hopes getting a tattoo will change the current status she has with her three daughters from mother/daughter to the friend/friend level. Meanwhile, Ryan gets camping lessons from Kyle.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Marriage Doctor
programme.desc: When Mike finds out his future son-in-law Kyle fears meeting with the church's new minister, Mike tells Kyle to use him and Vanessa as a strong marriage example. But a recent argument ends up sending them to the minister instead.

programme.title: Black-ish: Auntsgiving
programme.desc: Pops' older sister, Almaviligerais, unexpectedly arrives for Thanksgiving, much to everyone's delight except Ruby, who can't stand her ex-sister-in-law.

programme.title: Black-ish: R-E-S-P-E-C-T
programme.desc: Dre and Bow confront gender biases of their own after finding out that both Junior and Zoey have become sexually active. Meanwhile, Ruby is hurt when she finds out that Jack and Diane have been hanging out with a friend's grandmother after school.

programme.title: Batwoman: Time Off for Good Behaviour
programme.desc: A new foe emerges. Jacob travels down a dangerous path to eradicate mistakes of his past. Alice and Julia learn they have an enemy in common.

programme.title: Charmed: No Hablo Brujeria
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones are visited by a mysterious stranger looking for answers. Macy helps Jordan face down the past.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Mom and Pop Store
programme.desc: A salesman convinces George to buy a car that used to belong to Jon Voight. Elaine wins tickets for Mr. Pitt to participate in Macy's Thanksgiving Day parade. Kramer takes Jerry's sneakers to a shoe-repair business.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Soup
programme.desc: Jerry regrets accepting an expensive suit and Elaine tries to get rid of a visitor.

programme.title: Mom: Fireballs and Bullet Holes
programme.desc: Christy tries to start a relationship with her father, while Bonnie struggles to accept that Christy wants him in her life.

programme.title: Mom: Nietzsche and a Beer Run
programme.desc: Christy is tempted by her old vices when she dates an attractive, hard-partying man. Meanwhile, Bonnie decides her advice is worth money and becomes a life coach.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Maybe Baby
programme.desc: When the girls run into Caroline's newly engaged ex, Candy Andy, Caroline wonders if she made a mistake when she sees how much he supports his fiancé's career.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Inside Outside Situation
programme.desc: Max and Caroline's cupcake shop is boycotted after they refuse to sell cupcakes to an artist who wants to put cocktail weenies in them.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: As more information pours in about victims from the past, and how they tie to the murders of the present, Lt. Cooper and Amy Sykes get caught in an unexpected gun fight. Sharon finds leverage against Rev. Price, his attorney, and Mark Hickman.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk and the Sleeping Suspect
programme.desc: Monk is convinced that he knows who is behind a recent string of mail bombs in San Francisco.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Segment features Melissa McCarthy and Octavia Spencer, Demian Bichir, Jamie Foxx, Tye Sheridan and Lily-Rose Depp, Shailene Woodley, Anthony Mackie, Justin Worsham, Tia Mowry and Loretta Devine, Daisy Ridley, Gerard Butler and Nick Jonas.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Eye Can't See/ Noisy Neighbor Nonsense
programme.desc: A hockey fan is injured by a player at a game; Dispute between neighbors over loud music.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Powered Out of a Deal/ Chopped From the Karate Program
programme.desc: Man sues for non-payment of services; mother sues Karate program.

programme.title: Protection Court: I Carved Her Initials in My Chest/ I'm Going to Send This Video to Your Mom
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Thrown/ Tacky Nail Tech
programme.desc: Father sues for medical expenses; woman sues nail salon over sloppy pedicure.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Rogers vs. Stone
programme.desc: A Michigan man rejects his childhood friend's seven-month-old son and claims one of his friends is the biological father.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Casey vs. Hatfill
programme.desc: An Illinois man cheated and then married his family member's babysitter, but now he doubts fathering her 16-month-old son.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Rachel is suing her ex-boyfriend Daniel for money she loaned him for his cat to have a sex-change operation, and to put a deposit on a car. Phil is suing Kerry for a home improvement job that resulted in leaky windows.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff adopted her daughter’s baby boy, and she has petitioned the court to see if the defendant is her grandson’s father.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'It's Really Inferior ' and 'That's One Crappy-Caddy.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Burning Cobi's Private Parts.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Plumbing Problems/ Watched Out
programme.desc: Severe plumbing problems displace a tenant, then, an antique watch is damaged.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Scott says Kristen owes him for unpaid rent, late fees, utilities and property damages. Kristen says she doesn't owe Scott anything as she never missed rent payments, and left the home in great condition.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He Said He Only Cheated One Time, I Don't Believe Him
programme.desc: Renee and Brandon have been together for 6 months and she says it was an instant connection. However the honeymoon phase faded away when they both cheated. Now, Brandon believes Renee is still being unfaithful.

programme.title: Maury: I Pray My 17 Year Old Son Is Not Your Baby's Dad!
programme.desc: 16 year old Zaria was forced to drop out of high school when she got pregnant and gave birth to her daughter. The alleged father, Marquis and his mother Teresa believe that Zaria is pinning this baby on him because of his pro-football potential.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Cheating Like a Boss
programme.desc: Eli has been hooking up with his boss Regan to climb the proverbial ladder but his girlfriend Chiquita isn't pleased with him. Jessica wants to know what's going on between her boyfriend Jason and a woman named Meaty.

programme.title: Maury: Is My Ex ... Or My Neighbor's Husband the Father of My Baby?
programme.desc: Shaquila doesn't believe her father Robert is the father of Jacquay's daughter. Courtney was with her ex Hector and a married man Paul around the same time, and isn't sure which one is the father of her baby.
